---
title: "Trends in den einzelen Werten"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-20"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
```


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r Daten Laden}

# Daten laden 
datagruem <- read.table(file = "C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/EZG_poschiavino/alpe_gruem_wet_dat/Alp_gruem_wet_dat.csv" , header = TRUE, sep =";", dec = ".")
datacavaglia <- read.table(file = "C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/EZG_poschiavino/cavaglia_wet_dat/Cavaglia_wet_dat_vollstaendig.csv" , header = TRUE, sep =";", dec = ".")
datarobbia <-read.table(file = "C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/EZG_poschiavino/robbia_wet_dat_aut/ogd-smn_rob_d_historical.csv", header = TRUE, sep =";", dec = ".")
dataQleprese <- read.table(file = "C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/EZG_poschiavino/le_prese_abf_dat/17449_6191_2026-03-17_10-47-30/0078_Abfluss_Tagesmittel_1959-01-01_2025-12-31.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ";", dec = ".", fileEncoding = "latin1")
dataQLech <- read.table(file = "C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/EZG_Lech/Q-Tagesmittel-200378.csv", header = TRUE , sep =";" , dec= ".", fileEncoding = "latin1")
dataQGschnitzbach <- read.table(file = "C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/EZG_Gschnitzbach/Q-Tagesmittel-201566.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ";", dec = ".", fileEncoding = "latin1")
datazug <- read.table(file = "C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/EZG_Lech/SH-Tageswerte-100966.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ";", dec = ".", fileEncoding = "latin1")
datazuers <- read.table(file = "C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/EZG_Lech/SH-Tageswerte-101113.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ";", dec = ".", fileEncoding = "latin1")
datalech <- read.table(file = "C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/EZG_Lech/SH-Tageswerte-101121.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ";", dec = ".", fileEncoding = "latin1")
datatrins <- read.table(file = "C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/EZG_Gschnitzbach/SH-Tageswerte-102368.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ";", dec = ".", fileEncoding = "latin1")
datagschnitz <- read.table(file ="C:/Users/maggi/OneDrive/Studium/7_Semster/BA/Dat/EZG_Gschnitzbach/SH-Tageswerte-119412.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ";", dec = ".", fileEncoding = "latin1")

summary(datagruem)
head(datagruem)
names(datagruem)
summary(datacavaglia)
head(datacavaglia)
names(datacavaglia)
summary(datarobbia)
head(datarobbia)
names(datarobbia)
summary(dataQleprese)
head(dataQleprese)
names(dataQleprese)
summary(dataQLech)
head(dataQLech)
names(dataQLech)
summary(dataQGschnitzbach)
head(dataQGschnitzbach)
names(dataQGschnitzbach)
summary(datazug)
head(datazug)
names(datazug)
summary(datazuers)
head(datazuers)
names(datazuers)
summary(datalech)
head(datalech)
names(datalech)
summary(datatrins)
head(datatrins)
names(datatrins)
summary(datagschnitz)
head(datagschnitz)
names(datagschnitz)


```

```{r Daten vorbereiten}

#Daten vorbereiten 

library(zoo)

datacavaglia$date <- as.Date(datacavaglia$measure_date, format = "%d.%m.%Y %H:%M")
datacavaglia$date <-as.Date(datacavaglia$date)
datacavaglia$hs <- c(datacavaglia$Hs_m)
datacavaglia$hs <- as.numeric(datacavaglia$hs)
full_dates_cav <- data.frame(date = seq(min(datacavaglia$date),max(datacavaglia$date),by = "day"))
datacavaglia <- merge(full_dates_cav, datacavaglia, by = "date", all.x = TRUE)
datacavaglia$monat <- format(datacavaglia$date, "%m")
datacavaglia$hs[is.na(datacavaglia$hs) & datacavaglia$monat %in% c("06","07","08","09")] <- 0
datacavaglia$hs[is.na(datacavaglia$hs)] <- 0



datagruem$date <- as.Date(datagruem$measure_date, format = "%d.%m.%Y %H:%M")
datagruem$date <-as.Date(datagruem$date)
datagruem$hs <- c(datagruem$Hs_m)
datagruem$hs <- as.numeric(datagruem$hs)
full_dates_gruem <- data.frame(date = seq(min(datagruem$date),max(datagruem$date),by = "day"))
datagruem <- merge(full_dates_gruem, datagruem, by = "date", all.x = TRUE)
datagruem$monat <- format(datagruem$date, "%m")
datagruem$hs[is.na(datagruem$hs) & datagruem$monat %in% c("06","07","08","09")] <- 0
datagruem$hs[is.na(datagruem$hs)] <- 0




datarobbia$date <- as.Date(datarobbia$reference_timestamp, format = "%d.%m.%Y")
datarobbia$date <- as.Date (datarobbia$date)
datarobbia$hs <- c(datarobbia$schnee_man_m)
datarobbia$hs <- as.numeric(datarobbia$hs)
full_dates_rob <- data.frame(date = seq(min(datarobbia$date),max(datarobbia$date),by = "day"))
datarobbia <- merge(full_dates_rob, datarobbia, by = "date", all.x = TRUE)
datarobbia$monat <- format(datarobbia$date, "%m")
datarobbia$hs[is.na(datarobbia$hs) & datarobbia$monat %in% c("06","07","08","09")] <- 0
datarobbia$hs[is.na(datarobbia$hs)] <- 0



datalech$date <- as.Date(datalech$Werte_Lech., format = "%d.%m.%Y")
datalech$date <-as.Date(datalech$date)
datalech$hs <- c(datalech$HS_m)
datalech$hs <- as.numeric(datalech$hs)
full_dates_lech <- data.frame(date = seq(min(datalech$date),max(datalech$date),by = "day"))
datalech <- merge(full_dates_lech, datalech, by = "date", all.x = TRUE)
datalech$monat <- format(datalech$date, "%m")
datalech$hs[is.na(datalech$hs) & datalech$monat %in% c("06","07","08","09")] <- 0
datalech$hs[is.na(datalech$hs)] <- 0


datazuers$date <- as.Date(datazuers$Werte_Zuers., format = "%d.%m.%Y")
datazuers$date <-as.Date(datazuers$date)
datazuers$hs <- c(datazuers$HS_m)
datazuers$hs <- as.numeric(datazuers$hs)
full_dates_zuers <- data.frame(date = seq(min(datazuers$date),max(datazuers$date),by = "day"))
datazuers <- merge(full_dates_zuers, datazuers, by = "date", all.x = TRUE)
datazuers$monat <- format(datazuers$date, "%m")
datazuers$hs[is.na(datazuers$hs) & datazuers$monat %in% c("06","07","08","09")] <- 0
datazuers$hs[is.na(datazuers$hs)] <- 0


datazug$date <- as.Date(datazug$Werte_Zug., format = "%d.%m.%Y")
datazug$date <-as.Date(datazug$date)
datazug$hs <- c(datazug$HS_m)
datazug$hs <- as.numeric(datazug$hs)
full_dates_zug <- data.frame(date = seq(min(datazug$date),max(datazug$date),by = "day"))
datazug <- merge(full_dates_zug, datazug, by = "date", all.x = TRUE)
datazug$monat <- format(datazug$date, "%m")
datazug$hs[is.na(datazug$hs) & datazug$monat %in% c("06","07","08","09")] <- 0
datazug$hs[is.na(datazug$hs)] <- 0


datatrins$date <- as.Date(datatrins$Werte_Trins., format = "%d.%m.%Y")
datatrins$date <-as.Date(datatrins$date)
datatrins$hs <- c(datatrins$HS_m)
datatrins$hs <- as.numeric(datatrins$hs)
full_dates_trins <- data.frame(date = seq(min(datatrins$date),max(datatrins$date),by = "day"))
datatrins <- merge(full_dates_trins, datatrins, by = "date", all.x = TRUE)
datatrins$monat <- format(datatrins$date, "%m")
datatrins$hs[is.na(datatrins$hs) & datatrins$monat %in% c("06","07","08","09")] <- 0
datatrins$hs[is.na(datatrins$hs)] <- 0


datagschnitz$date <- as.Date(datagschnitz$Werte_Gschnitz., format = "%d.%m.%Y")
datagschnitz$date <-as.Date(datagschnitz$date)
datagschnitz$hs <- c(datagschnitz$HS_m)
datagschnitz$hs <- as.numeric(datagschnitz$hs)
full_dates_gsch <- data.frame(date = seq(min(datagschnitz$date),max(datagschnitz$date),by = "day"))
datagschnitz <- merge(full_dates_gsch, datagschnitz, by = "date", all.x = TRUE)
datagschnitz$monat <- format(datagschnitz$date, "%m")
datagschnitz$hs[is.na(datagschnitz$hs) & datagschnitz$monat %in% c("06","07","08","09")] <- 0
datagschnitz$hs[is.na(datagschnitz$hs)] <- 0


dataQleprese$Abfluss <- as.numeric(dataQleprese$Wert)
dataQleprese$date <-as.Date(dataQleprese$Zeitstempel, format = "%d.%m.%Y")
dataQLech$Abfluss <- as.numeric(dataQLech$X)
dataQLech$date <-as.Date(dataQLech$Werte., format = "%d.%m.%Y")
dataQGschnitzbach$Abfluss <- as.numeric(dataQGschnitzbach$X)
dataQGschnitzbach$date <-as.Date(dataQGschnitzbach$Werte., format = "%d.%m.%Y")






```

```{r subset der Daten auf die jû¥ngste Station}
#subset auf die jû¥ngste Station von allen (Vergleichbarkeit), MûÑglichkeit auf die jû¥ngste Station im EZG zu subsetten Poschiavino 1.11.1960 etc.


    #Cavaglia
cavaglia_sub <- datacavaglia[datacavaglia$date >= as.Date("1992-09-2") & datacavaglia$date <= as.Date("2022-09-01") ,]

cavaglia_ges <- datacavaglia[datacavaglia$date >= as.Date("1959-01-1") & datacavaglia$date <= as.Date("2025-12-31"),]

    #Alpe Grû¥m
gruem_sub <- datagruem[datagruem$date >= as.Date("1992-09-2")& datagruem$date <= as.Date("2022-09-1") ,]


gruem_ges <- datagruem[datagruem$date >= as.Date("1959-01-1") & datagruem$date <= as.Date("2025-12-31"),]
    #Robbia
robbia_sub <- datarobbia[datarobbia$date >= as.Date("1992-09-2") & datarobbia$date <= as.Date("2022-09-1"),]


robbia_ges <- datarobbia[datarobbia$date >= as.Date("1960-11-1") & datarobbia$date <= as.Date("2025-12-31"),]
robbiaQ_ges <- dataQleprese[dataQleprese$date >= as.Date("1960-11-1") & dataQleprese$date <= as.Date("2025-12-31"),]


    #Le prese
lepreseQ_sub <- dataQleprese[dataQleprese$date >= as.Date("1992-09-2") & dataQleprese$date <= as.Date("2022-09-1"),] 
  #Lech
    #Lech
lechQ_sub <- dataQLech[dataQLech$date >= as.Date("1992-09-2") & dataQLech$date <= as.Date("2022-09-1"),]
lech_sub <- datalech[datalech$date >= as.Date("1992-09-2") & datalech$date <= as.Date("2022-09-1"),]


lech_ges <- datalech

zuers_sub <- datazuers[datazuers$date >= as.Date("1992-09-2") & datazuers$date <= as.Date("2022-09-1"),]

zuersQ_ges <- dataQLech[dataQLech$date >= as.Date("1970-09-02") & dataQLech$date <= as.Date("2022-09-1"),]
zug_sub <- datazug[datazug$date >= as.Date("1992-09-2") & datazug$date <= as.Date("2022-09-1"),]

zugQ_ges <- dataQLech[dataQLech$date >= as.Date("1992-09-2") & dataQLech$date <= as.Date("2022-09-1"),]

  #Gschnitzbach

gschQ_sub <- dataQGschnitzbach[dataQGschnitzbach$date >= as.Date("1992-09-2") & dataQGschnitzbach$date <= as.Date("2022-09-1"),]
trins_sub <- datatrins[datatrins$date >= as.Date("1992-09-2") & datatrins$date <= as.Date("2022-09-1"),]

trinsQ_ges <- dataQGschnitzbach[dataQGschnitzbach$date >= as.Date("1970-09-2") & dataQGschnitzbach$date <= as.Date("2022-09-1"),]

gsch_sub <- datagschnitz[datagschnitz$date >= as.Date("1992-09-2") & datagschnitz$date <= as.Date("2022-09-1"),]

gschQ_ges <- dataQGschnitzbach[dataQGschnitzbach$date >= as.Date("1992-09-2") & dataQGschnitzbach$date <= as.Date("2022-09-1"),]


```

```{r Mergen der Daten}
library(rlang)
library(dplyr)
#Mergen zu testen der Daten gegeneinander
  #Poschiavino
    #Cavaglia
cav_leprese_merg_sub <- merge(cavaglia_sub,lepreseQ_sub, by ="date")
    #Alpe Grû¥m
gruem_leprese_merg_sub <- merge(gruem_sub, lepreseQ_sub, by="date")
    #Robbia
robbia_leprese_merg_sub <- merge(robbia_sub, lepreseQ_sub, by="date")

lech_lech_merg_sub <- merge(lech_sub, lechQ_sub, by="date")

zuers_lech_merg_sub <- merge(zuers_sub, lechQ_sub, by= "date")

zug_lech_merg_sub <- merge(zug_sub, lechQ_sub, by="date")

trins_gsch_merg_sub <- merge(trins_sub, gschQ_sub, by="date")

gsch_gsch_merg_sub <- merge(gsch_sub, gschQ_sub, by="date")

#Gesamter zeitraum



cav_leprese_merg_ges <- merge(cavaglia_ges, dataQleprese, by ="date")
    #Alpe Grû¥m
gruem_leprese_merg_ges <- merge(gruem_ges, dataQleprese, by="date")
    #Robbia
robbia_leprese_merg_ges <- merge(datarobbia, robbiaQ_ges, by="date")

lech_lech_merg_ges <- merge(lech_ges, lechQ_ges, by="date")

zuers_lech_merg_ges <- merge(datazuers, zuersQ_ges, by= "date")

zug_lech_merg_ges <- merge(datazug, zugQ_ges, by="date")

trins_gsch_merg_ges <- merge(datatrins, trinsQ_ges, by="date")

gsch_gsch_merg_ges <- merge(datagschnitz, gschQ_ges, by="date")

#Frû¥hling
s_cav_ges <- cav_leprese_merg_ges[format(cav_leprese_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("03","04","05","06"),]
s_gruem_ges <- gruem_leprese_merg_ges[format(gruem_leprese_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("03","04","05","06"),]
s_robbia_ges <- robbia_leprese_merg_ges[format(robbia_leprese_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("03","04","05","06"),]
s_lech_ges <- lech_lech_merg_ges[format(lech_lech_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("03","04", "05", "06"),]
s_zuers_ges <- zuers_lech_merg_ges[format(zuers_lech_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("03","04","05","06"),]
s_zug_ges <- zug_lech_merg_ges[format(zug_lech_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("03","04","05","06"),]
s_trins_ges <- trins_gsch_merg_ges[format(trins_gsch_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("03","04","05","06"),]
s_gsch_ges <- gsch_gsch_merg_ges[format(gsch_gsch_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("03","04","05","06"),]

s_cav_sub <- cav_leprese_merg_sub[format(cav_leprese_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("03","04","05","06"),]
s_gruem_sub <- gruem_leprese_merg_sub[format(gruem_leprese_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("03","04","05","06"),]
s_robbia_sub <- robbia_leprese_merg_sub[format(robbia_leprese_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("03","04","05","06"),]
s_lech_sub <- lech_lech_merg_sub[format(lech_lech_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("03","04","05","06"),]
s_zuers_sub <- zuers_lech_merg_sub[format(zuers_lech_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("03","04","05","06"),]
s_zug_sub <- zug_lech_merg_sub[format(zug_lech_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("03","04","05","06"),]
s_trins_sub <- trins_gsch_merg_sub[format(trins_gsch_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("03","04","05","06"),]
s_gsch_sub <- gsch_gsch_merg_sub[format(gsch_gsch_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("03","04","05","06"),]

#winter

w_cav_ges <- cav_leprese_merg_ges[format(cav_leprese_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("11","12","01","02"),]
w_gruem_ges <- gruem_leprese_merg_ges[format(gruem_leprese_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("11","12","01","02"),]
w_robbia_ges <- robbia_leprese_merg_ges[format(robbia_leprese_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("11","12","01","02"),]
w_lech_ges <- lech_lech_merg_ges[format(lech_lech_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("11","12","01","02"),]
w_zuers_ges <- zuers_lech_merg_ges[format(zuers_lech_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("11","12","01","02"),]
w_zug_ges <- zug_lech_merg_ges[format(zug_lech_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("11","12","01","02"),]
w_trins_ges <- trins_gsch_merg_ges[format(trins_gsch_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("11","12","01","02"),]
w_gsch_ges <- gsch_gsch_merg_ges[format(gsch_gsch_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("11","12","01","02"),]

w_cav_sub <- cav_leprese_merg_sub[format(cav_leprese_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("11","12","01","02"),]
w_gruem_sub <- gruem_leprese_merg_sub[format(gruem_leprese_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("11","12","01","02"),]
w_robbia_sub <- robbia_leprese_merg_sub[format(robbia_leprese_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("11","12","01","02"),]
w_lech_sub <- lech_lech_merg_sub[format(lech_lech_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("11","12","01","02"),]
w_zuers_sub <- zuers_lech_merg_sub[format(zuers_lech_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("11","12","01","02"),]
w_zug_sub <- zug_lech_merg_sub[format(zug_lech_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("11","12","01","02"),]
w_trins_sub <- trins_gsch_merg_sub[format(trins_gsch_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("11","12","01","02"),]
w_gsch_sub <- gsch_gsch_merg_sub[format(gsch_gsch_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("11","12","01","02"),]


```

```{r SWE berechnen}
#SWE Berechnen

library(nixmass)
library(ggplot2)


datacavaglia$SWE <- c(swe.delta.snow(datacavaglia[,c("date", "hs")], dyn_rho_max = FALSE))
datagruem$SWE <- c(swe.delta.snow(datagruem[,c("date", "hs")], dyn_rho_max = FALSE))
datarobbia$SWE <- c(swe.delta.snow(datarobbia[,c("date", "hs")], dyn_rho_max = FALSE))
datalech$SWE <- c(swe.delta.snow(datalech[,c("date", "hs")], dyn_rho_max = FALSE))
datazuers$SWE <- c(swe.delta.snow(datazuers[,c("date", "hs")], dyn_rho_max = FALSE))
datazug$SWE <- c(swe.delta.snow(datazug[,c("date", "hs")], dyn_rho_max = FALSE))
datatrins$SWE <- c(swe.delta.snow(datatrins[,c("date", "hs")], dyn_rho_max = FALSE))
datagschnitz$SWE <- c(swe.delta.snow(datagschnitz[,c("date", "hs")], dyn_rho_max = FALSE))



#Als Tabelle SWE, HS, Q 


```

```{r Pettitt Test}
# Pettitt Test (Brû¥che in den Zeitreihen erkennen)

  #Abfluss

    #Poschiavino

require(trend)
library(trend)

pettitt.test(dataQleprese$Abfluss)
result_Q_leprese <- pettitt.test(dataQleprese$Abfluss)

change_point_leprese <- result_Q_leprese$estimate
dataQleprese$date[change_point_leprese]

  #Lech 

pettitt.test(dataQLech$Abfluss)
result_Q_Lech <- pettitt.test(dataQLech$Abfluss)

change_point_Lech <- result_Q_Lech$estimate
dataQLech$date[change_point_Lech]

    #Gschnitzbach

pettitt.test(dataQGschnitzbach$Abfluss)
result_Q_Gschnitzbach <- pettitt.test(dataQGschnitzbach$Abfluss)

change_point_Gschnitzbach <- result_Q_Gschnitzbach$estimate
dataQGschnitzbach$date[change_point_Gschnitzbach]

  #SchneehûÑhe

    #Cavaglia

pettitt.test(datacavaglia$hs)
result_hs_cavaglia <- pettitt.test(datacavaglia$hs)

change_point_hs_cavaglia <- result_hs_cavaglia$estimate
datacavaglia$date[change_point_hs_cavaglia]

    #Alp Grû¥m
pettitt.test(datagruem$hs)
result_hs_gruem <- pettitt.test(datagruem$hs)

change_point_hs_gruem <- result_hs_gruem$estimate
datagruem$date[change_point_hs_gruem]

    #Robbia
pettitt.test(datarobbia$hs)
result_hs_robbia <- pettitt.test(datarobbia$hs)

change_point_hs_robbia <- result_hs_robbia$estimate
datarobbia$date[change_point_hs_robbia]
    #Zug
pettitt.test(datazug$hs)
result_hs_zug <- pettitt.test(datazug$hs) 

change_point_hs_zug <- result_hs_zug$estimate
datazug$date[change_point_hs_zug]
    #Zû¥rs
pettitt.test(datazuers$hs)
result_hs_zuers <- pettitt.test(datazuers$hs)

change_point_hs_zuers <- result_hs_zuers$estimate
datazuers$date[change_point_hs_zuers]
    #Lech
pettitt.test(datalech$hs)
result_hs_lech <- pettitt.test(datalech$hs)


change_point_hs_lech <- result_hs_lech$estimate
datalech$date[change_point_hs_lech]
    #Trins
pettitt.test(datatrins$hs)
result_hs_trins <- pettitt.test(datatrins$hs)

change_point_hs_trins <- result_hs_trins$estimate
datatrins$date[change_point_hs_trins]
    #Gschnitz
pettitt.test(datagschnitz$hs)
result_hs_gschnitz <- pettitt.test(datagschnitz$hs)

change_point_hs_gschnitz <- result_hs_gschnitz$estimate
datagschnitz$date[change_point_hs_gschnitz]

  #SWE 
    #Cavaglia
pettitt.test(datacavaglia$SWE)
result_SWE_cavaglia <- pettitt.test(datacavaglia$SWE)

change_point_SWE_cavaglia <- result_SWE_cavaglia$estimate
datacavaglia$date[change_point_SWE_cavaglia]

    #Alp Grû¥m
pettitt.test(datagruem$SWE)
result_SWE_gruem <- pettitt.test(datagruem$SWE)

change_point_SWE_gruem <- result_SWE_gruem$estimate
datagruem$date[change_point_SWE_gruem]
    #Robbia
pettitt.test(datarobbia$SWE)
result_SWE_robbia <- pettitt.test(datarobbia$SWE)

change_point_SWE_robbia <- result_SWE_robbia$estimate
datarobbia$date[change_point_SWE_robbia]

pettitt.test(datalech$SWE)
result_SWE_lech <- pettitt.test(datalech$SWE)
change_point_SWE_lech <- result_SWE_lech$estimate
datalech$date[change_point_SWE_lech]

pettitt.test(datazuers$SWE)
result_SWE_zuers <- pettitt.test(datazuers$SWE)
change_point_SWE_zuers <- result_SWE_zuers$estimate
datazuers$date[change_point_SWE_zuers]

pettitt.test(datazug$SWE)
result_SWE_zug <- pettitt.test(datazug$SWE)
change_point_SWE_zug <- result_SWE_zug$estimate
datazug$date[change_point_SWE_zug]

pettitt.test(datatrins$SWE)
result_SWE_trins <- pettitt.test(datatrins$SWE)
change_point_SWE_trins <- result_SWE_trins$estimate
datatrins$date[change_point_SWE_trins]

pettitt.test(datagschnitz$SWE)
result_SWE_gsch <- pettitt.test(datagschnitz$SWE)
change_point_SWE_gsch <- result_SWE_gsch$estimate
datagschnitz$date[change_point_SWE_gsch]
######Ursachen fû¥r Brû¥che rausfinden. MûÑglicherweise fand eine verschiebung der Stationen statt (plausibelstes mittel)
###alle Pettitt Test sind signifikant


```

```{r Mann Kendall Test fû¥r den gesamten Zeitraum}
#Mann Kendell Test (erkennen von Trends, aber nicht StûÊrke des Trends), auf Jahr gesehen 

  #Abfluss
    #Poschaivino
mk_Q_leprese <- mk.test(dataQleprese$Abfluss)
print(mk_Q_leprese) 

    #Lech
mk_Q_Lech <- mk.test(dataQLech$Abfluss)
print(mk_Q_Lech) 
    #Gschnitzbach
mk_Q_Gschnitzbach <- mk.test(dataQGschnitzbach$Abfluss)
print(mk_Q_Gschnitzbach) 

  #SchneehûÑhe

    #cavaglia
mk_hs_cavaglia <- mk.test(datacavaglia$hs)
print(mk_hs_cavaglia) 

    #Alp Grû¥m
mk_hs_gruem <- mk.test(datagruem$hs)
print(mk_hs_gruem) 

    #Robbia
mk_hs_Robbia <- mk.test(datarobbia$hs)
print(mk_hs_Robbia) 

    #Lech
mk_hs_Lech <- mk.test(datalech$hs)
print(mk_hs_Lech) 
    #Zû¥rs
mk_hs_zuers <- mk.test(datazuers$hs)
print(mk_hs_zuers) 
    #Zug
mk_hs_zug <- mk.test(datazug$hs)
print(mk_hs_zug) 
    #Trins
mk_hs_trins <- mk.test(datatrins$hs)
print(mk_hs_trins) 
    #Gschnitz
mk_hs_gschnitz <- mk.test(datagschnitz$hs)
print(mk_hs_gschnitz) 

  #SWE

    #Cavaglia
mk_SWE_cavaglia <- mk.test(datacavaglia$SWE)
print(mk_SWE_cavaglia) 

    #Alp Grû¥m
mk_SWE_gruem <- mk.test(datagruem$SWE)
print(mk_SWE_gruem) 

    #Robbia
mk_SWE_robbia <- mk.test(datarobbia$SWE)
print(mk_SWE_robbia) 

mk_SWE_lech <- mk.test(datalech$SWE)
print(mk_SWE_lech)

mk_SWE_zuers <- mk.test(datazuers$SWE)
print(mk_SWE_zuers)

mk_SWE_zug <- mk.test(datazug$SWE)
print(mk_SWE_zug)

mk_SWE_trins <- mk.test(datatrins$SWE)
print(mk_SWE_trins)

mk_SWE_gsch <- mk.test(datagschnitz$SWE)
print(mk_SWE_gsch)
#Mann kendall Test Frû¥hling gesamter Zeitraum

s_Qleprese_ges <- dataQleprese[format(dataQleprese$date,"%m") %in% c("03","04","05","06"),]
s_Qlech_ges <- dataQLech[format(dataQLech$date,"%m") %in% c("03","04","05","06"),]
s_Qgsch_ges <- dataQGschnitzbach[format(dataQGschnitzbach$date,"%m") %in% c("03","04","05","06"),]




  #Abfluss
    #Poschaivino
mk_Qleprese_s_ges <- mk.test(s_Qleprese_ges$Abfluss)
print(mk_Qleprese_s_ges)  

    #Lech
mk_QLech_s_ges <- mk.test(s_Qlech_ges$Abfluss)
print(mk_QLech_s_ges) 
    #Gschnitzbach
mk_QGschnitzbach_s_ges <- mk.test(s_Qgsch_ges$Abfluss)
print(mk_QGschnitzbach_s_ges) 

  #SchneehûÑhe

    #cavaglia
mk_hs_cavaglia_s_ges <- mk.test(s_cav_ges$hs)
print(mk_hs_cavaglia_s_ges) 

    #Alp Grû¥m
mk_hs_gruem_s_ges <- mk.test(s_gruem_ges$hs)
print(mk_hs_gruem_s_ges) 

    #Robbia
mk_hs_Robbia_s_ges <- mk.test(s_rob_ges$hs)
print(mk_hs_Robbia_s_ges) 

    #Lech
mk_hs_Lech_s_ges <- mk.test(s_lech_ges$hs)
print(mk_hs_Lech_s_ges) 
    #Zû¥rs
mk_hs_zuers_s_ges <- mk.test(s_zuers_ges$hs)
print(mk_hs_zuers_s_ges) 
    #Zug
mk_hs_zug_s_ges <- mk.test(s_zug_ges$hs)
print(mk_hs_zug_s_ges) 
    #Trins
mk_hs_trins_s_ges <- mk.test(s_trins_ges$hs)
print(mk_hs_trins_s_ges) 
    #Gschnitz
mk_hs_gschnitz_s_ges <- mk.test(s_gschnitz_ges$hs)
print(mk_hs_gschnitz_s_ges) 

  #SWE

    #Cavaglia
mk_SWE_cavaglia_s_ges <- mk.test(s_cav_ges$SWE)
print(mk_SWE_cavaglia_s_ges) 

    #Alp Grû¥m
mk_SWE_gruem_s_ges <- mk.test(s_gruem_ges$SWE)
print(mk_SWE_gruem_s_ges) 

    #Robbia
mk_SWE_robbia_s_ges <- mk.test(s_rob_ges$SWE)
print(mk_SWE_robbia_s_ges)

mk_SWE_lech_s_ges <- mk.test(s_lech_ges$SWE)
print(mk_SWE_lech_s_ges)

mk_SWE_zuers_s_ges <- mk.test(s_zuers_ges$SWE)
print(mk_SWE_zuers_s_ges)

mk_SWE_zug_s_ges <- mk.test(s_zug_ges$SWE)
print(mk_SWE_zug_s_ges)

mk_SWE_trins_s_ges <- mk.test(s_trins_ges$SWE)
print(mk_SWE_trins_s_ges)

mk_SWE_gsch_s_ges <- mk.test(s_gschnitz_ges$SWE)
print(mk_SWE_gsch_s_ges)

#Mann kendall Test Winter gesamter Zeitraum

w_Qleprese_ges <- dataQleprese[format(dataQleprese$date,"%m") %in% c("11","12","01","02"),]
w_Qlech_ges <- dataQLech[format(dataQLech$date,"%m") %in% c("11","12","01","02"),]
w_Qgsch_ges <- dataQGschnitzbach[format(dataQGschnitzbach$date,"%m") %in% c("11","12","01","01"),]




  #Abfluss
    #Poschaivino
mk_Qleprese_w_ges <- mk.test(w_Qleprese_ges$Abfluss)
print(mk_Qleprese_w_ges)  

    #Lech
mk_QLech_w_ges <- mk.test(w_Qlech_ges$Abfluss)
print(mk_QLech_w_ges) 
    #Gschnitzbach
mk_QGschnitzbach_w_ges <- mk.test(w_Qgsch_ges$Abfluss)
print(mk_QGschnitzbach_w_ges) 

  #SchneehûÑhe

    #cavaglia
mk_hs_cavaglia_w_ges <- mk.test(w_cav_ges$hs)
print(mk_hs_cavaglia_w_ges) 

    #Alp Grû¥m
mk_hs_gruem_w_ges <- mk.test(w_gruem_ges$hs)
print(mk_hs_gruem_w_ges) 

    #Robbia
mk_hs_Robbia_w_ges <- mk.test(w_rob_ges$hs)
print(mk_hs_Robbia_w_ges) 

    #Lech
mk_hs_Lech_w_ges <- mk.test(w_lech_ges$hs)
print(mk_hs_Lech_w_ges) 
    #Zû¥rs
mk_hs_zuers_w_ges <- mk.test(w_zuers_ges$hs)
print(mk_hs_zuers_w_ges) 
    #Zug
mk_hs_zug_w_ges <- mk.test(w_zug_ges$hs)
print(mk_hs_zug_w_ges) 
    #Trins
mk_hs_trins_w_ges <- mk.test(w_trins_ges$hs)
print(mk_hs_trins_w_ges) 
    #Gschnitz
mk_hs_gschnitz_w_ges <- mk.test(w_gschnitz_ges$hs)
print(mk_hs_gschnitz_w_ges) 

  #SWE

    #Cavaglia
mk_SWE_cavaglia_w_ges <- mk.test(w_cav_ges$SWE)
print(mk_SWE_cavaglia_w_ges) 

    #Alp Grû¥m
mk_SWE_gruem_w_ges <- mk.test(w_gruem_ges$SWE)
print(mk_SWE_gruem_w_ges) 

    #Robbia
mk_SWE_robbia_w_ges <- mk.test(w_rob_ges$SWE)
print(mk_SWE_robbia_w_ges) 

mk_SWE_lech_w_ges <- mk.test(w_lech_ges$SWE)
print(mk_SWE_lech_w_ges)

mk_SWE_zuers_w_ges <- mk.test(w_zuers_ges$SWE)
print(mk_SWE_zuers_w_ges)

mk_SWE_zug_w_ges <- mk.test(w_zug_ges$SWE)
print(mk_SWE_zug_w_ges)

mk_SWE_trins_w_ges <- mk.test(w_trins_ges$SWE)
print(mk_SWE_trins_w_ges)

mk_SWE_gsch_w_ges <- mk.test(w_gschnitz_ges$SWE)
print(mk_SWE_gsch_w_ges)


```

```{r Mann Kendall Test fû¥r die subsetdata}
#Mann Kendall Test fû¥r subset data
#Mann Kendell Test (erkennen von Trends, aber nicht StûÊrke des Trends), auf Jahr gesehen 

  #Abfluss
    #Poschaivino
library(trend)
mk_lepreseQ_sub <- mk.test(lepreseQ_sub$Abfluss)

    #Lech
mk_lechQ_sub <- mk.test(lechQ_sub$Abfluss)
    #Gschnitzbach
mk_gschQ_sub <- mk.test(gschQ_sub$Abfluss)

  #SchneehûÑhe

    #cavaglia
mk_hs_cav_sub <- mk.test(cavaglia_sub$hs)

    #Alp Grû¥m
mk_hs_gruem_sub <- mk.test(gruem_sub$hs)

    #Robbia
mk_hs_robbia_sub <- mk.test(robbia_sub$hs)

    #Lech
mk_hs_lech_sub <- mk.test(lech_sub$hs)
    #Zû¥rs
mk_hs_zuers_sub <- mk.test(zuers_sub$hs)
    #Zug
mk_hs_zug_sub <- mk.test(zug_sub$hs)
    #Trins
mk_hs_trins_sub <- mk.test(trins_sub$hs)
    #Gschnitz
mk_hs_gsch_sub <- mk.test(gsch_sub$hs)

  #SWE

    #Cavaglia
mk_SWE_cav_sub <- mk.test(cavaglia_sub$SWE)

    #Alp Grû¥m
mk_SWE_gruem_sub <- mk.test(gruem_sub$SWE)

    #Robbia
mk_SWE_robbia_sub <- mk.test(robbia_sub$SWE)

mk_SWE_lech_sub <- mk.test(lech_sub$SWE)
print(mk_SWE_lech_sub)

mk_SWE_zuers_sub <- mk.test(zuers_sub$SWE)

mk_SWE_zug_sub <- mk.test(zug_sub$SWE)

mk_SWE_trins_sub <- mk.test(trins_sub$SWE)

mk_SWE_gsch_sub <- mk.test(gsch_sub$SWE)

#Mann kendall Test Frû¥hling subset zeitraum

s_Qleprese_sub <- lepreseQ_sub[format(lepreseQ_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("03","04","05","06"),]
s_Qlech_sub <- lechQ_sub[format(lechQ_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("03","04","05","06"),]
s_Qgsch_sub <- gschQ_sub[format(gschQ_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("03","04","05","06"),]



  #Abfluss
    #Poschaivino
mk_Qleprese_s_sub <- mk.test(s_Qleprese_sub$Abfluss)

    #Lech
mk_QLech_s_sub <- mk.test(s_Qlech_sub$Abfluss)
    #Gschnitzbach
mk_Qgsch_s_sub <- mk.test(s_Qgsch_sub$Abfluss)

  #SchneehûÑhe

    #cavaglia
mk_hs_cav_s_sub <- mk.test(s_cav_sub$hs)

    #Alp Grû¥m
mk_hs_gruem_s_sub <- mk.test(s_gruem_sub$hs)

    #Robbia
mk_hs_Robbia_s_sub <- mk.test(s_robbia_sub$hs)

    #Lech
mk_hs_Lech_s_sub <- mk.test(s_lech_sub$hs)
    #Zû¥rs
mk_hs_zuers_s_sub <- mk.test(s_zuers_sub$hs)
    #Zug
mk_hs_zug_s_sub <- mk.test(s_zug_sub$hs)
    #Trins
mk_hs_trins_s_sub <- mk.test(s_trins_sub$hs)
    #Gschnitz
mk_hs_gsch_s_sub <- mk.test(s_gsch_sub$hs)

  #SWE

    #Cavaglia
mk_SWE_cav_s_sub <- mk.test(s_cav_sub$SWE)

    #Alp Grû¥m
mk_SWE_gruem_s_sub <- mk.test(s_gruem_sub$SWE)

    #Robbia
mk_SWE_robbia_s_sub <- mk.test(s_robbia_sub$SWE)

mk_SWE_lech_s_sub <- mk.test(s_lech_sub$SWE)

mk_SWE_zuers_s_sub <- mk.test(s_zuers_sub$SWE)

mk_SWE_zug_s_sub <- mk.test(s_zug_sub$SWE)

mk_SWE_trins_s_sub <- mk.test(s_trins_sub$SWE)

mk_SWE_gsch_s_sub <- mk.test(s_gsch_sub$SWE)

#Mann kendall Test Winter den subset Zeitraum

w_Qleprese_sub <- lepreseQ_sub[format(lepreseQ_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("11","12","01","02"),]
w_Qlech_sub <- lechQ_sub[format(lechQ_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("11","12","01","02"),]
w_Qgsch_sub <- gschQ_sub[format(gschQ_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("11","12","01","01"),]




  #Abfluss
    #Poschaivino
mk_Qleprese_w_sub <- mk.test(w_Qleprese_sub$Abfluss)

    #Lech
mk_Qlech_w_sub <- mk.test(w_Qlech_sub$Abfluss)
    #Gschnitzbach
mk_Qgsch_w_sub <- mk.test(w_Qgsch_sub$Abfluss)

  #SchneehûÑhe

    #cavaglia
mk_hs_cav_w_sub <- mk.test(w_cav_sub$hs)

    #Alp Grû¥m
mk_hs_gruem_w_sub <- mk.test(w_gruem_sub$hs)

    #Robbia
mk_hs_robbia_w_sub <- mk.test(w_robbia_sub$hs)

    #Lech
mk_hs_lech_w_sub <- mk.test(w_lech_sub$hs)
    #Zû¥rs
mk_hs_zuers_w_sub <- mk.test(w_zuers_sub$hs)
    #Zug
mk_hs_zug_w_sub <- mk.test(w_zug_sub$hs)
    #Trins
mk_hs_trins_w_sub <- mk.test(w_trins_sub$hs)
    #Gschnitz
mk_hs_gsch_w_sub <- mk.test(w_gsch_sub$hs)

  #SWE

    #Cavaglia
mk_SWE_cav_w_sub <- mk.test(w_cav_sub$SWE)

    #Alp Grû¥m
mk_SWE_gruem_w_sub <- mk.test(w_gruem_sub$SWE)

    #Robbia
mk_SWE_robbia_w_sub <- mk.test(w_robbia_sub$SWE)

mk_SWE_lech_w_sub <- mk.test(w_lech_sub$SWE)

mk_SWE_zuers_w_sub <- mk.test(w_zuers_sub$SWE)

mk_SWE_zug_w_sub <- mk.test(w_zug_sub$SWE)

mk_SWE_trins_w_sub <- mk.test(w_trins_sub$SWE)

mk_SWE_gsch_w_sub <- mk.test(w_gsch_sub$SWE)

```

```{r Sen Slope SchûÊtzer fû¥r den gesamten Zeitraum}
#SenôÇôÇs Slope SchûÊtzer (wie stark ist ein Trend)


  #Abfluss
    #Poschiavino
library(trend)

sen_Q_leprese <- sens.slope(dataQleprese$Abfluss) 

    #Lech 
sen_Q_Lech <- sens.slope(dataQLech$Abfluss)

    #Gschnitzbach
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach <- sens.slope(dataQGschnitzbach$Abfluss)

  #SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia
sen_hs_cavaglia <- sens.slope(datacavaglia$hs)

    #Alp Grû¥m
sen_hs_gruem <- sens.slope(datagruem$hs)

    #Robbia
sen_hs_robbia <- sens.slope(datarobbia$hs)

    #Lech
sen_hs_lech <- sens.slope(datalech$hs)
    #Zû¥rs
sen_hs_zuers <- sens.slope(datazuers$hs)
    #Trins
sen_hs_trins <- sens.slope(datatrins$hs)

  #SWE
    #Cavaglia
sen_SWE_cavaglia <- sens.slope(datacavaglia$SWE)
    #Alp Grû¥m 
sen_SWE_gruem <- sens.slope(datagruem$SWE)
    #Robbia
sen_SWE_robbia <- sens.slope(datarobbia$SWE)

sen_SWE_lech <- sens.slope(datalech$SWE)

sen_SWE_zuers <- sens.slope(datazuers$SWE)

sen_SWE_zug <- sens.slope(datazug$SWE)

sen_SWE_trins <- sens.slope(datatrins$SWE)

sen_SWE_gsch <- sens.slope(datagschnitz$SWE)


 
#SenôÇSlope fû¥r das Frû¥hjahr fû¥r den gesamten Beobachtungszeitraum


  #Abfluss
    #Poschiavino

sen_Q_leprese_s_ges <- sens.slope(s_Qleprese_ges$Abfluss)

    #Lech 
sen_Q_Lech_s_ges <- sens.slope(s_Qlech_ges$Abfluss)

    #Gschnitzbach
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_s_ges <- sens.slope(s_Qgsch_ges$Abfluss)

  #SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia
sen_hs_cavaglia_s_ges <- sens.slope(s_cav_ges$hs)

    #Alp Grû¥m
sen_hs_gruem_s_ges <- sens.slope(s_gruem_ges$hs)

    #Robbia
sen_hs_robbia_s_ges <- sens.slope(s_rob_ges$hs)

    #Lech
sen_hs_lech_s_ges <- sens.slope(s_lech_ges$hs)
    #Zû¥rs
sen_hs_zuers_s_ges <- sens.slope(s_zuers_ges$hs)
    #Zug
sen_hs_zug_s_ges <- sens.slope(s_zug_ges$hs)
    #Trins
sen_hs_trins_s_ges <- sens.slope(s_trins_ges$hs)
    #Gschnitz
sen_hs_gschnitz_s_ges <- sens.slope(s_gschnitz_ges$hs)

  #SWE
    #Cavaglia
sen_SWE_cavaglia_s_ges <- sens.slope(s_cav_ges$SWE)
    #Alp Grû¥m 
sen_SWE_gruem_s_ges <- sens.slope(s_gruem_ges$SWE)
    #Robbia
sen_SWE_robbia_s_ges <- sens.slope(s_rob_ges$SWE)

sen_SWE_lech_s_ges <- sens.slope(s_lech_ges$SWE)

sen_SWE_zuers_s_ges <- sens.slope(s_zuers_ges$SWE)

sen_SWE_zug_s_ges <- sens.slope(s_zug_ges$SWE)

sen_SWE_trins_s_ges <- sens.slope(s_trins_ges$SWE)

sen_SWE_gsch_s_ges <- sens.slope(s_gschnitz_ges$SWE)

#SenôÇSlope fû¥r den Winter fû¥r den gesamten Beobachtungszeitraum


  #Abfluss
    #Poschiavino

sen_Q_leprese_w_ges <- sens.slope(w_Qleprese_ges$Abfluss)

    #Lech 
sen_Q_Lech_w_ges <- sens.slope(w_Qlech_ges$Abfluss)

    #Gschnitzbach
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_w_ges <- sens.slope(w_Qgsch_ges$Abfluss)

  #SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia
sen_hs_cavaglia_w_ges <- sens.slope(w_cav_ges$hs)

    #Alp Grû¥m
sen_hs_gruem_w_ges <- sens.slope(w_gruem_ges$hs)

    #Robbia
sen_hs_robbia_w_ges <- sens.slope(w_rob_ges$hs)

    #Lech
sen_hs_lech_w_ges <- sens.slope(w_lech_ges$hs)
    #Zû¥rs
sen_hs_zuers_w_ges <- sens.slope(w_zuers_ges$hs)
    #Zug
sen_hs_zug_w_ges <- sens.slope(w_zug_ges$hs)
    #Trins
sen_hs_trins_w_ges <- sens.slope(w_trins_ges$hs)
    #Gschnitz
sen_hs_gschnitz_w_ges <- sens.slope(w_gschnitz_ges$hs)

  #SWE
    #Cavaglia
sen_SWE_cavaglia_w_ges <- sens.slope(w_cav_ges$SWE)
    #Alp Grû¥m 
sen_SWE_gruem_w_ges <- sens.slope(w_gruem_ges$SWE)
    #Robbia
sen_SWE_robbia_w_ges <- sens.slope(w_rob_ges$SWE)

sen_SWE_lech_w_ges <- sens.slope(w_lech_ges$SWE)

sen_SWE_zuers_w_ges <- sens.slope(w_zuers_ges$SWE)

sen_SWE_zug_w_ges <- sens.slope(w_zug_ges$SWE)

sen_SWE_trins_w_ges <- sens.slope(w_trins_ges$SWE)

sen_SWE_gsch_w_ges <- sens.slope(w_gschnitz_ges$SWE)


```

```{r Sen Slope SchûÊtzer fû¥r die subsetdata}
#SenôÇôÇs Slope SchûÊtzer (wie stark ist ein Trend) fû¥r den subset Zeitraum


  #Abfluss
    #Poschiavino

sen_Qleprese_sub <- sens.slope(lepreseQ_sub$Abfluss)

    #Lech 
sen_Qlech_sub <- sens.slope(lechQ_sub$Abfluss)

    #Gschnitzbach
sen_Qgsch_sub <- sens.slope(gschQ_sub$Abfluss)

  #SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia
sen_hs_cav_sub <- sens.slope(cavaglia_sub$hs)

    #Alp Grû¥m
sen_hs_gruem_sub <- sens.slope(gruem_sub$hs)

    #Robbia
sen_hs_robbia_sub <- sens.slope(robbia_sub$hs)

    #Lech
sen_hs_lech_sub <- sens.slope(lech_sub$hs)
print(sen_hs_lech_sub)
    #Zû¥rs
sen_hs_zuers_sub <- sens.slope(zuers_sub$hs)

    #Zug
sen_hs_zug_sub <- sens.slope(zug_sub$hs)
    #Trins
sen_hs_trins_sub <- sens.slope(trins_sub$hs)

  #SWE
    #Cavaglia
sen_SWE_cav_sub <- sens.slope(cavaglia_sub$SWE)
    #Alp Grû¥m 
sen_SWE_gruem_sub <- sens.slope(gruem_sub$SWE)
    #Robbia
sen_SWE_robbia_sub <- sens.slope(robbia_sub$SWE)

sen_SWE_lech_sub <- sens.slope(lech_sub$SWE)

sen_SWE_zuers_sub <- sens.slope(zuers_sub$SWE)

sen_SWE_zug_sub <- sens.slope(zug_sub$SWE)

sen_SWE_trins_sub <- sens.slope(trins_sub$SWE)

sen_SWE_gsch_sub <- sens.slope(gsch_sub$SWE)


 
#SenôÇSlope fû¥r das Frû¥hjahr fû¥r den subset zeitraum


  #Abfluss
    #Poschiavino

sen_Qleprese_s_sub <- sens.slope(s_Qleprese_sub$Abfluss)

    #Lech 
sen_Qlech_s_sub <- sens.slope(s_Qlech_sub$Abfluss)

    #Gschnitzbach
sen_Qgsch_s_sub <- sens.slope(s_Qgsch_sub$Abfluss)

  #SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia
sen_hs_cav_s_sub <- sens.slope(s_cav_sub$hs)

    #Alp Grû¥m
sen_hs_gruem_s_sub <- sens.slope(s_gruem_sub$hs)

    #Robbia
sen_hs_robbia_s_sub <- sens.slope(s_robbia_sub$hs)

    #Lech
sen_hs_lech_s_sub <- sens.slope(s_lech_sub$hs)
    #Zû¥rs
sen_hs_zuers_s_sub <- sens.slope(s_zuers_sub$hs)
    #Zug
sen_hs_zug_s_sub <- sens.slope(s_zug_sub$hs)
    #Trins
sen_hs_trins_s_sub <- sens.slope(s_trins_sub$hs)
    #Gschnitz
sen_hs_gsch_s_sub <- sens.slope(s_gsch_sub$hs)

  #SWE
    #Cavaglia
sen_SWE_cav_s_sub <- sens.slope(s_cav_sub$SWE)
    #Alp Grû¥m 
sen_SWE_gruem_s_sub <- sens.slope(s_gruem_sub$SWE)
    #Robbia
sen_SWE_robbia_s_sub <- sens.slope(s_robbia_sub$SWE)

sen_SWE_lech_s_sub <- sens.slope(s_lech_sub$SWE)

sen_SWE_zuers_s_sub <- sens.slope(s_zuers_sub$SWE)

sen_SWE_zug_s_sub <- sens.slope(s_zug_sub$SWE)

sen_SWE_trins_s_sub <- sens.slope(s_trins_sub$SWE)

sen_SWE_gsch_s_sub <- sens.slope(s_gsch_sub$SWE)

#SenôÇSlope fû¥r den Winter fû¥r den subset Zeitraum


  #Abfluss
    #Poschiavino

sen_Qleprese_w_sub <- sens.slope(w_Qleprese_sub$Abfluss)

    #Lech 
sen_Qlech_w_sub <- sens.slope(w_Qlech_sub$Abfluss)

    #Gschnitzbach
sen_Qgsch_w_sub <- sens.slope(w_Qgsch_sub$Abfluss)

  #SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia
sen_hs_cav_w_sub <- sens.slope(w_cav_sub$hs)

    #Alp Grû¥m
sen_hs_gruem_w_sub <- sens.slope(w_gruem_sub$hs)

    #Robbia
sen_hs_robbia_w_sub <- sens.slope(w_robbia_sub$hs)

    #Lech
sen_hs_lech_w_sub <- sens.slope(w_lech_sub$hs)
    #Zû¥rs
sen_hs_zuers_w_sub <- sens.slope(w_zuers_sub$hs)
    #Zug
sen_hs_zug_w_sub <- sens.slope(w_zug_sub$hs)
    #Trins
sen_hs_trins_w_sub <- sens.slope(w_trins_sub$hs)
    #Gschnitz
sen_hs_gsch_w_sub <- sens.slope(w_gsch_sub$hs)

  #SWE
    #Cavaglia
sen_SWE_cav_w_sub <- sens.slope(w_cav_sub$SWE)
    #Alp Grû¥m 
sen_SWE_gruem_w_sub <- sens.slope(w_gruem_sub$SWE)
    #Robbia
sen_SWE_robbia_w_sub <- sens.slope(w_robbia_sub$SWE)

sen_SWE_lech_w_sub <- sens.slope(w_lech_sub$SWE)

sen_SWE_zuers_w_sub <- sens.slope(w_zuers_sub$SWE)

sen_SWE_zug_w_sub <- sens.slope(w_zug_sub$SWE)

sen_SWE_trins_w_sub <- sens.slope(w_trins_sub$SWE)

sen_SWE_gsch_w_sub <- sens.slope(w_gsch_sub$SWE)

```


```{r Sen Slope in hs, Q, SWE fû¥r die einzelnen Monate der Schneeperiode des gesamten Zeitraums}
library(trend)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
#Einzel Monate erstellen
november_Qleprese_ges <- dataQleprese[format(dataQleprese$date,"%m") %in% c("11"),]
november_Qlech_ges <- dataQLech[format(dataQLech$date,"%m") %in% c("11"),]
november_Qgsch_ges <- dataQGschnitzbach[format(dataQGschnitzbach$date,"%m") %in% c("11"),]
november_cav_ges <- cav_leprese_merg_ges[format(cav_leprese_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("11"),]
november_gruem_ges <- gruem_leprese_merg_ges[format(gruem_leprese_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("11"),]
november_rob_ges <- robbia_leprese_merg_ges[format(robbia_leprese_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("11"),]
november_lech_ges <- lech_lech_merg_ges[format(lech_lech_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("11"),]
november_zug_ges <- zug_lech_merg_ges[format(zug_lech_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("11"),]
november_zuers_ges <- zuers_lech_merg_ges[format(zuers_lech_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("11"),]
november_trins_ges <- trins_gsch_merg_ges[format(trins_gsch_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("11"),]
november_gschnitz_ges <- gsch_gsch_merg_ges[format(gsch_gsch_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("11"),]

dezember_Qleprese_ges <- dataQleprese[format(dataQleprese$date,"%m") %in% c("12"),]
dezember_Qlech_ges <- dataQLech[format(dataQLech$date,"%m") %in% c("12"),]
dezember_Qgsch_ges <- dataQGschnitzbach[format(dataQGschnitzbach$date,"%m") %in% c("12"),]
dezember_cav_ges <- cav_leprese_merg_ges[format(cav_leprese_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("12"),]
dezember_gruem_ges <- gruem_leprese_merg_ges[format(gruem_leprese_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("12"),]
dezember_rob_ges <- robbia_leprese_merg_ges[format(robbia_leprese_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("12"),]
dezember_lech_ges <- lech_lech_merg_ges[format(lech_lech_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("12"),]
dezember_zug_ges <- zug_lech_merg_ges[format(zug_lech_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("12"),]
dezember_zuers_ges <- zuers_lech_merg_ges[format(zuers_lech_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("12"),]
dezember_trins_ges <- trins_gsch_merg_ges[format(trins_gsch_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("12"),]
dezember_gschnitz_ges <- gsch_gsch_merg_ges[format(gsch_gsch_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("12"),]

januar_Qleprese_ges <- dataQleprese[format(dataQleprese$date,"%m") %in% c("01"),]
januar_Qlech_ges <- dataQLech[format(dataQLech$date,"%m") %in% c("01"),]
januar_Qgsch_ges <- dataQGschnitzbach[format(dataQGschnitzbach$date,"%m") %in% c("01"),]
januar_cav_ges <- cav_leprese_merg_ges[format(cav_leprese_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("01"),]
januar_gruem_ges <- gruem_leprese_merg_ges[format(gruem_leprese_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("01"),]
januar_rob_ges <- robbia_leprese_merg_ges[format(robbia_leprese_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("01"),]
januar_lech_ges <- lech_lech_merg_ges[format(lech_lech_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("01"),]
januar_zug_ges <- zug_lech_merg_ges[format(zug_lech_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("01"),]
januar_zuers_ges <- zuers_lech_merg_ges[format(zuers_lech_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("01"),]
januar_trins_ges <- trins_gsch_merg_ges[format(trins_gsch_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("01"),]
januar_gschnitz_ges <- gsch_gsch_merg_ges[format(gsch_gsch_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("01"),]

februar_Qleprese_ges <- dataQleprese[format(dataQleprese$date,"%m") %in% c("02"),]
februar_Qlech_ges <- dataQLech[format(dataQLech$date,"%m") %in% c("02"),]
februar_Qgsch_ges <- dataQGschnitzbach[format(dataQGschnitzbach$date,"%m") %in% c("02"),]
februar_cav_ges <- cav_leprese_merg_ges[format(cav_leprese_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("02"),]
februar_gruem_ges <- gruem_leprese_merg_ges[format(gruem_leprese_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("02"),]
februar_rob_ges <- robbia_leprese_merg_ges[format(robbia_leprese_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("02"),]
februar_lech_ges <- lech_lech_merg_ges[format(lech_lech_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("02"),]
februar_zug_ges <- zug_lech_merg_ges[format(zug_lech_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("02"),]
februar_zuers_ges <- zuers_lech_merg_ges[format(zuers_lech_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("02"),]
februar_trins_ges <- trins_gsch_merg_ges[format(trins_gsch_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("02"),]
februar_gschnitz_ges <- gsch_gsch_merg_ges[format(gsch_gsch_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("02"),]

maerz_Qleprese_ges <- dataQleprese[format(dataQleprese$date,"%m") %in% c("03"),]
maerz_Qlech_ges <- dataQLech[format(dataQLech$date,"%m") %in% c("03"),]
maerz_Qgsch_ges <- dataQGschnitzbach[format(dataQGschnitzbach$date,"%m") %in% c("03"),]
maerz_cav_ges <- cav_leprese_merg_ges[format(cav_leprese_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("03"),]
maerz_gruem_ges <- gruem_leprese_merg_ges[format(gruem_leprese_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("03"),]
maerz_rob_ges <- robbia_leprese_merg_ges[format(robbia_leprese_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("03"),]
maerz_lech_ges <- lech_lech_merg_ges[format(lech_lech_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("03"),]
maerz_zug_ges <- zug_lech_merg_ges[format(zug_lech_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("03"),]
maerz_zuers_ges <- zuers_lech_merg_ges[format(zuers_lech_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("03"),]
maerz_trins_ges <- trins_gsch_merg_ges[format(trins_gsch_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("03"),]
maerz_gschnitz_ges <- gsch_gsch_merg_ges[format(gsch_gsch_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("03"),]

april_Qleprese_ges <- dataQleprese[format(dataQleprese$date,"%m") %in% c("04"),]
april_Qlech_ges <- dataQLech[format(dataQLech$date,"%m") %in% c("04"),]
april_Qgsch_ges <- dataQGschnitzbach[format(dataQGschnitzbach$date,"%m") %in% c("04"),]
april_cav_ges <- cav_leprese_merg_ges[format(cav_leprese_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("04"),]
april_gruem_ges <- gruem_leprese_merg_ges[format(gruem_leprese_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("04"),]
april_rob_ges <- robbia_leprese_merg_ges[format(robbia_leprese_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("04"),]
april_lech_ges <- lech_lech_merg_ges[format(lech_lech_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("04"),]
april_zug_ges <- zug_lech_merg_ges[format(zug_lech_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("04"),]
april_zuers_ges <- zuers_lech_merg_ges[format(zuers_lech_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("04"),]
april_trins_ges <- trins_gsch_merg_ges[format(trins_gsch_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("04"),]
april_gschnitz_ges <- gsch_gsch_merg_ges[format(gsch_gsch_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("04"),]

mai_Qleprese_ges <- dataQleprese[format(dataQleprese$date,"%m") %in% c("05"),]
mai_Qlech_ges <- dataQLech[format(dataQLech$date,"%m") %in% c("05"),]
mai_Qgsch_ges <- dataQGschnitzbach[format(dataQGschnitzbach$date,"%m") %in% c("05"),]
mai_cav_ges <- cav_leprese_merg_ges[format(cav_leprese_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("05"),]
mai_gruem_ges <- gruem_leprese_merg_ges[format(gruem_leprese_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("05"),]
mai_rob_ges <- robbia_leprese_merg_ges[format(robbia_leprese_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("05"),]
mai_lech_ges <- lech_lech_merg_ges[format(lech_lech_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("05"),]
mai_zug_ges <- zug_lech_merg_ges[format(zug_lech_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("05"),]
mai_zuers_ges <- zuers_lech_merg_ges[format(zuers_lech_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("05"),]
mai_trins_ges <- trins_gsch_merg_ges[format(trins_gsch_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("05"),]
mai_gschnitz_ges <- gsch_gsch_merg_ges[format(gsch_gsch_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("05"),]

juni_Qleprese_ges <- dataQleprese[format(dataQleprese$date,"%m") %in% c("06"),]
juni_Qlech_ges <- dataQLech[format(dataQLech$date,"%m") %in% c("06"),]
juni_Qgsch_ges <- dataQGschnitzbach[format(dataQGschnitzbach$date,"%m") %in% c("06"),]
juni_cav_ges <- cav_leprese_merg_ges[format(cav_leprese_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("06"),]
juni_gruem_ges <- gruem_leprese_merg_ges[format(gruem_leprese_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("06"),]
juni_rob_ges <- robbia_leprese_merg_ges[format(robbia_leprese_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("06"),]
juni_lech_ges <- lech_lech_merg_ges[format(lech_lech_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("06"),]
juni_zug_ges <- zug_lech_merg_ges[format(zug_lech_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("06"),]
juni_zuers_ges <- zuers_lech_merg_ges[format(zuers_lech_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("06"),]
juni_trins_ges <- trins_gsch_merg_ges[format(trins_gsch_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("06"),]
juni_gschnitz_ges <- gsch_gsch_merg_ges[format(gsch_gsch_merg_ges$date,"%m") %in% c("06"),]


#November


  #Abfluss
    #Poschiavino

sen_Q_leprese_november_ges <- sens.slope(november_Qleprese_ges$Abfluss)

    #Lech 
sen_Q_Lech_november_ges <- sens.slope(november_Qlech_ges$Abfluss)

    #Gschnitzbach
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_november_ges <- sens.slope(november_Qgsch_ges$Abfluss)

  #SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia
sen_hs_cavaglia_november_ges <- sens.slope(november_cav_ges$hs)

    #Alp Grû¥m
sen_hs_gruem_november_ges <- sens.slope(november_gruem_ges$hs)

    #Robbia
sen_hs_robbia_november_ges <- sens.slope(november_rob_ges$hs)

    #Lech
sen_hs_lech_november_ges <- sens.slope(november_lech_ges$hs)
    #Zû¥rs
sen_hs_zuers_november_ges <- sens.slope(november_zuers_ges$hs)
    #Zug
sen_hs_zug_november_ges <- sens.slope(november_zug_ges$hs)
    #Trins
sen_hs_trins_november_ges <- sens.slope(november_trins_ges$hs)
    #Gschnitz
sen_hs_gschnitz_november_ges <- sens.slope(november_gschnitz_ges$hs)

  #SWE
    #Cavaglia
sen_SWE_cavaglia_november_ges <- sens.slope(november_cav_ges$SWE)
    #Alp Grû¥m 
sen_SWE_gruem_november_ges <- sens.slope(november_gruem_ges$SWE)
    #Robbia
sen_SWE_robbia_november_ges <- sens.slope(november_rob_ges$SWE)

sen_SWE_lech_november_ges <- sens.slope(november_lech_ges$SWE)

sen_SWE_zuers_november_ges <- sens.slope(november_zuers_ges$SWE)

sen_SWE_zug_november_ges <- sens.slope(november_zug_ges$SWE)

sen_SWE_trins_november_ges <- sens.slope(november_trins_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_gsch_november_ges <- sens.slope(november_gschnitz_ges$SWE)


#Dezember


  #Abfluss
    #Poschiavino

sen_Q_leprese_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(dezember_Qleprese_ges$Abfluss)

    #Lech 
sen_Q_Lech_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(dezember_Qlech_ges$Abfluss)

    #Gschnitzbach
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(dezember_Qgsch_ges$Abfluss)


  #SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia
sen_hs_cavaglia_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(dezember_cav_ges$hs)


    #Alp Grû¥m
sen_hs_gruem_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(dezember_gruem_ges$hs)


    #Robbia
sen_hs_robbia_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(dezember_rob_ges$hs)


    #Lech
sen_hs_lech_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(dezember_lech_ges$hs)

    #Zû¥rs
sen_hs_zuers_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(dezember_zuers_ges$hs)

    #Zug
sen_hs_zug_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(dezember_zug_ges$hs)

    #Trins
sen_hs_trins_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(dezember_trins_ges$hs)

    #Gschnitz
sen_hs_gschnitz_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(dezember_gschnitz_ges$hs)


  #SWE
    #Cavaglia
sen_SWE_cavaglia_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(dezember_cav_ges$SWE)

    #Alp Grû¥m 
sen_SWE_gruem_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(dezember_gruem_ges$SWE)

    #Robbia
sen_SWE_robbia_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(dezember_rob_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_lech_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(dezember_lech_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_zuers_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(dezember_zuers_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_zug_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(dezember_zug_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_trins_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(dezember_trins_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_gsch_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(dezember_gschnitz_ges$SWE)



#Januar


  #Abfluss
    #Poschiavino

sen_Q_leprese_januar_ges <- sens.slope(januar_Qleprese_ges$Abfluss)

    #Lech 
sen_Q_Lech_januar_ges <- sens.slope(januar_Qlech_ges$Abfluss)

    #Gschnitzbach
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_januar_ges <- sens.slope(januar_Qgsch_ges$Abfluss)

  #SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia
sen_hs_cavaglia_januar_ges <- sens.slope(januar_cav_ges$hs)

    #Alp Grû¥m
sen_hs_gruem_januar_ges <- sens.slope(januar_gruem_ges$hs)

    #Robbia
sen_hs_robbia_januar_ges <- sens.slope(januar_rob_ges$hs)

    #Lech
sen_hs_lech_januar_ges <- sens.slope(januar_lech_ges$hs)

    #Zû¥rs
sen_hs_zuers_januar_ges <- sens.slope(januar_zuers_ges$hs)

    #Zug
sen_hs_zug_januar_ges <- sens.slope(januar_zug_ges$hs)

    #Trins
sen_hs_trins_januar_ges <- sens.slope(januar_trins_ges$hs)

    #Gschnitz
sen_hs_gschnitz_januar_ges <- sens.slope(januar_gschnitz_ges$hs)


  #SWE
    #Cavaglia
sen_SWE_cavaglia_januar_ges <- sens.slope(januar_cav_ges$SWE)

    #Alp Grû¥m 
sen_SWE_gruem_januar_ges <- sens.slope(januar_gruem_ges$SWE)
    #Robbia
sen_SWE_robbia_januar_ges <- sens.slope(januar_rob_ges$SWE)

sen_SWE_lech_januar_ges <- sens.slope(januar_lech_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_zuers_januar_ges <- sens.slope(januar_zuers_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_zug_januar_ges <- sens.slope(januar_zug_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_trins_januar_ges <- sens.slope(januar_trins_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_gsch_januar_ges <- sens.slope(januar_gschnitz_ges$SWE)



#Februar


  #Abfluss
    #Poschiavino

sen_Q_leprese_februar_ges <- sens.slope(februar_Qleprese_ges$Abfluss)

    #Lech 
sen_Q_Lech_februar_ges <- sens.slope(februar_Qlech_ges$Abfluss)

    #Gschnitzbach
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_februar_ges <- sens.slope(februar_Qgsch_ges$Abfluss)


  #SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia
sen_hs_cavaglia_februar_ges <- sens.slope(februar_cav_ges$hs)


    #Alp Grû¥m
sen_hs_gruem_februar_ges <- sens.slope(februar_gruem_ges$hs)


    #Robbia
sen_hs_robbia_februar_ges <- sens.slope(februar_rob_ges$hs)


    #Lech
sen_hs_lech_februar_ges <- sens.slope(februar_lech_ges$hs)

    #Zû¥rs
sen_hs_zuers_februar_ges <- sens.slope(februar_zuers_ges$hs)

    #Zug
sen_hs_zug_februar_ges <- sens.slope(februar_zug_ges$hs)

    #Trins
sen_hs_trins_februar_ges <- sens.slope(februar_trins_ges$hs)

    #Gschnitz
sen_hs_gschnitz_februar_ges <- sens.slope(februar_gschnitz_ges$hs)


  #SWE
    #Cavaglia
sen_SWE_cavaglia_februar_ges <- sens.slope(februar_cav_ges$SWE)

    #Alp Grû¥m 
sen_SWE_gruem_februar_ges <- sens.slope(februar_gruem_ges$SWE)

    #Robbia
sen_SWE_robbia_februar_ges <- sens.slope(februar_rob_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_lech_februar_ges <- sens.slope(februar_lech_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_zuers_februar_ges <- sens.slope(februar_zuers_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_zug_februar_ges <- sens.slope(februar_zug_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_trins_februar_ges <- sens.slope(februar_trins_ges$SWE)

sen_SWE_gsch_februar_ges <- sens.slope(februar_gschnitz_ges$SWE)



#MûÊrz


  #Abfluss
    #Poschiavino

sen_Q_leprese_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(maerz_Qleprese_ges$Abfluss)

    #Lech 
sen_Q_Lech_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(maerz_Qlech_ges$Abfluss)

    #Gschnitzbach
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(maerz_Qgsch_ges$Abfluss)


  #SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia
sen_hs_cavaglia_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(maerz_cav_ges$hs)


    #Alp Grû¥m
sen_hs_gruem_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(maerz_gruem_ges$hs)


    #Robbia
sen_hs_robbia_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(maerz_rob_ges$hs)


    #Lech
sen_hs_lech_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(maerz_lech_ges$hs)

    #Zû¥rs
sen_hs_zuers_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(maerz_zuers_ges$hs)

    #Zug
sen_hs_zug_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(maerz_zug_ges$hs)

    #Trins
sen_hs_trins_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(maerz_trins_ges$hs)

    #Gschnitz
sen_hs_gschnitz_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(maerz_gschnitz_ges$hs)


  #SWE
    #Cavaglia
sen_SWE_cavaglia_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(maerz_cav_ges$SWE)

    #Alp Grû¥m 
sen_SWE_gruem_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(maerz_gruem_ges$SWE)

    #Robbia
sen_SWE_robbia_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(maerz_rob_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_lech_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(maerz_lech_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_zuers_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(maerz_zuers_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_zug_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(maerz_zug_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_trins_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(maerz_trins_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_gsch_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(maerz_gschnitz_ges$SWE)


#April
 #Abfluss
    #Poschiavino

sen_Q_leprese_april_ges <- sens.slope(april_Qleprese_ges$Abfluss)

    #Lech 
sen_Q_Lech_april_ges <- sens.slope(april_Qlech_ges$Abfluss)

    #Gschnitzbach
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_april_ges <- sens.slope(april_Qgsch_ges$Abfluss)

  #SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia
sen_hs_cavaglia_april_ges <- sens.slope(april_cav_ges$hs)

    #Alp Grû¥m
sen_hs_gruem_april_ges <- sens.slope(april_gruem_ges$hs)


    #Robbia
sen_hs_robbia_april_ges <- sens.slope(april_rob_ges$hs)


    #Lech
sen_hs_lech_april_ges <- sens.slope(april_lech_ges$hs)

    #Zû¥rs
sen_hs_zuers_april_ges <- sens.slope(april_zuers_ges$hs)

    #Zug
sen_hs_zug_april_ges <- sens.slope(april_zug_ges$hs)

    #Trins
sen_hs_trins_april_ges <- sens.slope(april_trins_ges$hs)

    #Gschnitz
sen_hs_gschnitz_april_ges <- sens.slope(april_gschnitz_ges$hs)


  #SWE
    #Cavaglia
sen_SWE_cavaglia_april_ges <- sens.slope(april_cav_ges$SWE)

    #Alp Grû¥m 
sen_SWE_gruem_april_ges <- sens.slope(april_gruem_ges$SWE)

    #Robbia
sen_SWE_robbia_april_ges <- sens.slope(april_rob_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_lech_april_ges <- sens.slope(april_lech_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_zuers_april_ges <- sens.slope(april_zuers_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_zug_april_ges <- sens.slope(april_zug_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_trins_april_ges <- sens.slope(april_trins_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_gsch_april_ges <- sens.slope(april_gschnitz_ges$SWE)


#Mai

sen_Q_leprese_mai_ges <- sens.slope(mai_Qleprese_ges$Abfluss)

    #Lech 
sen_Q_Lech_mai_ges <- sens.slope(mai_Qlech_ges$Abfluss)

    #Gschnitzbach
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_mai_ges <- sens.slope(mai_Qgsch_ges$Abfluss)

  #SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia
sen_hs_cavaglia_mai_ges <- sens.slope(mai_cav_ges$hs)

    #Alp Grû¥m
sen_hs_gruem_mai_ges <- sens.slope(mai_gruem_ges$hs)

    #Robbia
sen_hs_robbia_mai_ges <- sens.slope(mai_rob_ges$hs)

    #Lech
sen_hs_lech_mai_ges <- sens.slope(mai_lech_ges$hs)

    #Zû¥rs
sen_hs_zuers_mai_ges <- sens.slope(mai_zuers_ges$hs)

    #Zug
sen_hs_zug_mai_ges <- sens.slope(mai_zug_ges$hs)

    #Trins
sen_hs_trins_mai_ges <- sens.slope(mai_trins_ges$hs)

    #Gschnitz
sen_hs_gschnitz_mai_ges <- sens.slope(mai_gschnitz_ges$hs)


  #SWE
    #Cavaglia
sen_SWE_cavaglia_mai_ges <- sens.slope(mai_cav_ges$SWE)

    #Alp Grû¥m 
sen_SWE_gruem_mai_ges <- sens.slope(mai_gruem_ges$SWE)

    #Robbia
sen_SWE_robbia_mai_ges <- sens.slope(mai_rob_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_lech_mai_ges <- sens.slope(mai_lech_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_zuers_mai_ges <- sens.slope(mai_zuers_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_zug_mai_ges <- sens.slope(mai_zug_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_trins_mai_ges <- sens.slope(mai_trins_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_gsch_mai_ges <- sens.slope(mai_gschnitz_ges$SWE)


#Juni

sen_Q_leprese_juni_ges <- sens.slope(juni_Qleprese_ges$Abfluss)

    #Lech 
sen_Q_Lech_juni_ges <- sens.slope(juni_Qlech_ges$Abfluss)

    #Gschnitzbach
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_juni_ges <- sens.slope(juni_Qgsch_ges$Abfluss)

  #SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia
sen_hs_cavaglia_juni_ges <- sens.slope(juni_cav_ges$hs)

    #Alp Grû¥m
sen_hs_gruem_juni_ges <- sens.slope(juni_gruem_ges$hs)


    #Robbia
sen_hs_robbia_juni_ges <- sens.slope(juni_rob_ges$hs)


    #Lech
sen_hs_lech_juni_ges <- sens.slope(juni_lech_ges$hs)
    #Zû¥rs
sen_hs_zuers_juni_ges <- sens.slope(juni_zuers_ges$hs)

    #Zug
sen_hs_zug_juni_ges <- sens.slope(juni_zug_ges$hs)

    #Trins
sen_hs_trins_juni_ges <- sens.slope(juni_trins_ges$hs)

    #Gschnitz
sen_hs_gschnitz_juni_ges <- sens.slope(juni_gschnitz_ges$hs)


  #SWE
    #Cavaglia
sen_SWE_cavaglia_juni_ges <- sens.slope(juni_cav_ges$SWE)

    #Alp Grû¥m 
sen_SWE_gruem_juni_ges <- sens.slope(juni_gruem_ges$SWE)

    #Robbia
sen_SWE_robbia_juni_ges <- sens.slope(juni_rob_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_lech_juni_ges <- sens.slope(juni_lech_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_zuers_juni_ges <- sens.slope(juni_zuers_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_zug_juni_ges <- sens.slope(juni_zug_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_trins_juni_ges <- sens.slope(juni_trins_ges$SWE)


sen_SWE_gsch_juni_ges <- sens.slope(juni_gschnitz_ges$SWE)



```

```{r Sen Slope in hs, Q, SWE fû¥r die einzelnen Monate der Schneeperiode des Subset Zeitraums}

#Einzel Monate erstellen
november_Qleprese_sub <- lepreseQ_sub[format(lepreseQ_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("11"),]
november_Qlech_sub <- lechQ_sub[format(lechQ_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("11"),]
november_Qgsch_sub <- gschQ_sub[format(gschQ_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("11"),]
november_cav_sub <- cav_leprese_merg_sub[format(cav_leprese_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("11"),]
november_gruem_sub <- gruem_leprese_merg_sub[format(gruem_leprese_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("11"),]
november_rob_sub <- robbia_leprese_merg_sub[format(robbia_leprese_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("11"),]
november_lech_sub <- lech_lech_merg_sub[format(lech_lech_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("11"),]
november_zug_sub <- zug_lech_merg_sub[format(zug_lech_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("11"),]
november_zuers_sub <- zuers_lech_merg_sub[format(zuers_lech_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("11"),]
november_trins_sub <- trins_gsch_merg_sub[format(trins_gsch_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("11"),]
november_gschnitz_sub <- gsch_gsch_merg_sub[format(gsch_gsch_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("11"),]

dezember_Qleprese_sub <- lepreseQ_sub[format(lepreseQ_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("12"),]
dezember_Qlech_sub <- lechQ_sub[format(lechQ_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("12"),]
dezember_Qgsch_sub <- gschQ_sub[format(gschQ_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("12"),]
dezember_cav_sub <- cav_leprese_merg_sub[format(cav_leprese_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("12"),]
dezember_gruem_sub <- gruem_leprese_merg_sub[format(gruem_leprese_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("12"),]
dezember_rob_sub <- robbia_leprese_merg_sub[format(robbia_leprese_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("12"),]
dezember_lech_sub <- lech_lech_merg_sub[format(lech_lech_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("12"),]
dezember_zug_sub <- zug_lech_merg_sub[format(zug_lech_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("12"),]
dezember_zuers_sub <- zuers_lech_merg_sub[format(zuers_lech_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("12"),]
dezember_trins_sub <- trins_gsch_merg_sub[format(trins_gsch_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("12"),]
dezember_gschnitz_sub <- gsch_gsch_merg_sub[format(gsch_gsch_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("12"),]

januar_Qleprese_sub <- lepreseQ_sub[format(lepreseQ_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("01"),]
januar_Qlech_sub <- lechQ_sub[format(lechQ_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("01"),]
januar_Qgsch_sub <- gschQ_sub[format(gschQ_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("01"),]
januar_cav_sub <- cav_leprese_merg_sub[format(cav_leprese_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("01"),]
januar_gruem_sub <- gruem_leprese_merg_sub[format(gruem_leprese_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("01"),]
januar_rob_sub <- robbia_leprese_merg_sub[format(robbia_leprese_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("01"),]
januar_lech_sub <- lech_lech_merg_sub[format(lech_lech_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("01"),]
januar_zug_sub <- zug_lech_merg_sub[format(zug_lech_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("01"),]
januar_zuers_sub <- zuers_lech_merg_sub[format(zuers_lech_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("01"),]
januar_trins_sub <- trins_gsch_merg_sub[format(trins_gsch_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("01"),]
januar_gschnitz_sub <- gsch_gsch_merg_sub[format(gsch_gsch_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("01"),]

februar_Qleprese_sub <- lepreseQ_sub[format(lepreseQ_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("02"),]
februar_Qlech_sub <- lechQ_sub[format(lechQ_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("02"),]
februar_Qgsch_sub <- gschQ_sub[format(gschQ_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("02"),]
februar_cav_sub <- cav_leprese_merg_sub[format(cav_leprese_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("02"),]
februar_gruem_sub <- gruem_leprese_merg_sub[format(gruem_leprese_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("02"),]
februar_rob_sub <- robbia_leprese_merg_sub[format(robbia_leprese_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("02"),]
februar_lech_sub <- lech_lech_merg_sub[format(lech_lech_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("02"),]
februar_zug_sub <- zug_lech_merg_sub[format(zug_lech_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("02"),]
februar_zuers_sub <- zuers_lech_merg_sub[format(zuers_lech_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("02"),]
februar_trins_sub <- trins_gsch_merg_sub[format(trins_gsch_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("02"),]
februar_gschnitz_sub <- gsch_gsch_merg_sub[format(gsch_gsch_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("02"),]


maerz_Qleprese_sub <- lepreseQ_sub[format(lepreseQ_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("03"),]
maerz_Qlech_sub <- lechQ_sub[format(lechQ_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("03"),]
maerz_Qgsch_sub <- gschQ_sub[format(gschQ_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("03"),]
maerz_cav_sub <- cav_leprese_merg_sub[format(cav_leprese_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("03"),]
maerz_gruem_sub <- gruem_leprese_merg_sub[format(gruem_leprese_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("03"),]
maerz_rob_sub <- robbia_leprese_merg_sub[format(robbia_leprese_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("03"),]
maerz_lech_sub <- lech_lech_merg_sub[format(lech_lech_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("03"),]
maerz_zug_sub <- zug_lech_merg_sub[format(zug_lech_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("03"),]
maerz_zuers_sub <- zuers_lech_merg_sub[format(zuers_lech_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("03"),]
maerz_trins_sub <- trins_gsch_merg_sub[format(trins_gsch_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("03"),]
maerz_gschnitz_sub <- gsch_gsch_merg_sub[format(gsch_gsch_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("03"),]

april_Qleprese_sub <- lepreseQ_sub[format(lepreseQ_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("04"),]
april_Qlech_sub <- lechQ_sub[format(lechQ_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("04"),]
april_Qgsch_sub <- gschQ_sub[format(gschQ_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("04"),]
april_cav_sub <- cav_leprese_merg_sub[format(cav_leprese_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("04"),]
april_gruem_sub <- gruem_leprese_merg_sub[format(gruem_leprese_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("04"),]
april_rob_sub <- robbia_leprese_merg_sub[format(robbia_leprese_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("04"),]
april_lech_sub <- lech_lech_merg_sub[format(lech_lech_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("04"),]
april_zug_sub <- zug_lech_merg_sub[format(zug_lech_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("04"),]
april_zuers_sub <- zuers_lech_merg_sub[format(zuers_lech_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("04"),]
april_trins_sub <- trins_gsch_merg_sub[format(trins_gsch_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("04"),]
april_gschnitz_sub <- gsch_gsch_merg_sub[format(gsch_gsch_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("04"),]

mai_Qleprese_sub <- lepreseQ_sub[format(lepreseQ_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("05"),]
mai_Qlech_sub <- lechQ_sub[format(lechQ_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("05"),]
mai_Qgsch_sub <- gschQ_sub[format(gschQ_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("05"),]
mai_cav_sub <- cav_leprese_merg_sub[format(cav_leprese_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("05"),]
mai_gruem_sub <- gruem_leprese_merg_sub[format(gruem_leprese_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("05"),]
mai_rob_sub <- robbia_leprese_merg_sub[format(robbia_leprese_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("05"),]
mai_lech_sub <- lech_lech_merg_sub[format(lech_lech_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("05"),]
mai_zug_sub <- zug_lech_merg_sub[format(zug_lech_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("05"),]
mai_zuers_sub <- zuers_lech_merg_sub[format(zuers_lech_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("05"),]
mai_trins_sub <- trins_gsch_merg_sub[format(trins_gsch_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("05"),]
mai_gschnitz_sub <- gsch_gsch_merg_sub[format(gsch_gsch_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("05"),]

juni_Qleprese_sub <- lepreseQ_sub[format(lepreseQ_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("06"),]
juni_Qlech_sub <- lechQ_sub[format(lechQ_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("06"),]
juni_Qgsch_sub <- gschQ_sub[format(gschQ_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("06"),]
juni_cav_sub <- cav_leprese_merg_sub[format(cav_leprese_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("06"),]
juni_gruem_sub <- gruem_leprese_merg_sub[format(gruem_leprese_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("06"),]
juni_rob_sub <- robbia_leprese_merg_sub[format(robbia_leprese_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("06"),]
juni_lech_sub <- lech_lech_merg_sub[format(lech_lech_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("06"),]
juni_zug_sub <- zug_lech_merg_sub[format(zug_lech_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("06"),]
juni_zuers_sub <- zuers_lech_merg_sub[format(zuers_lech_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("06"),]
juni_trins_sub <- trins_gsch_merg_sub[format(trins_gsch_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("06"),]
juni_gschnitz_sub <- gsch_gsch_merg_sub[format(gsch_gsch_merg_sub$date,"%m") %in% c("06"),]

#November


  #Abfluss
    #Poschiavino

sen_Q_leprese_november_sub <- sens.slope(november_Qleprese_sub$Abfluss)

    #Lech 
sen_Q_Lech_november_sub <- sens.slope(november_Qlech_sub$Abfluss)

    #Gschnitzbach
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_november_sub <- sens.slope(november_Qgsch_sub$Abfluss)


  #SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia
sen_hs_cavaglia_november_sub <- sens.slope(november_cav_sub$hs)


    #Alp Grû¥m
sen_hs_gruem_november_sub <- sens.slope(november_gruem_sub$hs)


    #Robbia
sen_hs_robbia_november_sub <- sens.slope(november_rob_sub$hs)


    #Lech
sen_hs_lech_november_sub <- sens.slope(november_lech_sub$hs)

    #Zû¥rs
sen_hs_zuers_november_sub <- sens.slope(november_zuers_sub$hs)

    #Zug
sen_hs_zug_november_sub <- sens.slope(november_zug_sub$hs)

    #Trins
sen_hs_trins_november_sub <- sens.slope(november_trins_sub$hs)

    #Gschnitz
sen_hs_gschnitz_november_sub <- sens.slope(november_gschnitz_sub$hs)


  #SWE
    #Cavaglia
sen_SWE_cavaglia_november_sub <- sens.slope(november_cav_sub$SWE)

    #Alp Grû¥m 
sen_SWE_gruem_november_sub <- sens.slope(november_gruem_sub$SWE)

    #Robbia
sen_SWE_robbia_november_sub <- sens.slope(november_rob_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_lech_november_sub <- sens.slope(november_lech_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_zuers_november_sub <- sens.slope(november_zuers_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_zug_november_sub <- sens.slope(november_zug_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_trins_november_sub <- sens.slope(november_trins_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_gsch_november_sub <- sens.slope(november_gschnitz_sub$SWE)


#Dezember


  #Abfluss
    #Poschiavino

sen_Q_leprese_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(dezember_Qleprese_sub$Abfluss)

    #Lech 
sen_Q_Lech_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(dezember_Qlech_sub$Abfluss)

    #Gschnitzbach
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(dezember_Qgsch_sub$Abfluss)


  #SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia
sen_hs_cavaglia_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(dezember_cav_sub$hs)


    #Alp Grû¥m
sen_hs_gruem_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(dezember_gruem_sub$hs)


    #Robbia
sen_hs_robbia_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(dezember_rob_sub$hs)


    #Lech
sen_hs_lech_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(dezember_lech_sub$hs)

    #Zû¥rs
sen_hs_zuers_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(dezember_zuers_sub$hs)

    #Zug
sen_hs_zug_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(dezember_zug_sub$hs)

    #Trins
sen_hs_trins_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(dezember_trins_sub$hs)

    #Gschnitz
sen_hs_gschnitz_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(dezember_gschnitz_sub$hs)


  #SWE
    #Cavaglia
sen_SWE_cavaglia_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(dezember_cav_sub$SWE)

    #Alp Grû¥m 
sen_SWE_gruem_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(dezember_gruem_sub$SWE)

    #Robbia
sen_SWE_robbia_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(dezember_rob_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_lech_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(dezember_lech_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_zuers_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(dezember_zuers_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_zug_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(dezember_zug_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_trins_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(dezember_trins_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_gsch_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(dezember_gschnitz_sub$SWE)


#Januar


  #Abfluss
    #Poschiavino

sen_Q_leprese_januar_sub <- sens.slope(januar_Qleprese_sub$Abfluss)

    #Lech 
sen_Q_Lech_januar_sub <- sens.slope(januar_Qlech_sub$Abfluss)

    #Gschnitzbach
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_januar_sub <- sens.slope(januar_Qgsch_sub$Abfluss)

  #SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia
sen_hs_cavaglia_januar_sub <- sens.slope(januar_cav_sub$hs)

    #Alp Grû¥m
sen_hs_gruem_januar_sub <- sens.slope(januar_gruem_sub$hs)

    #Robbia
sen_hs_robbia_januar_sub <- sens.slope(januar_rob_sub$hs)

    #Lech
sen_hs_lech_januar_sub <- sens.slope(januar_lech_sub$hs)
    #Zû¥rs
sen_hs_zuers_januar_sub <- sens.slope(januar_zuers_sub$hs)

    #Zug
sen_hs_zug_januar_sub <- sens.slope(januar_zug_sub$hs)

    #Trins
sen_hs_trins_januar_sub <- sens.slope(januar_trins_sub$hs)

    #Gschnitz
sen_hs_gschnitz_januar_sub <- sens.slope(januar_gschnitz_sub$hs)


  #SWE
    #Cavaglia
sen_SWE_cavaglia_januar_sub <- sens.slope(januar_cav_sub$SWE)

    #Alp Grû¥m 
sen_SWE_gruem_januar_sub <- sens.slope(januar_gruem_sub$SWE)

    #Robbia
sen_SWE_robbia_januar_sub <- sens.slope(januar_rob_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_lech_januar_sub <- sens.slope(januar_lech_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_zuers_januar_sub <- sens.slope(januar_zuers_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_zug_januar_sub <- sens.slope(januar_zug_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_trins_januar_sub <- sens.slope(januar_trins_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_gsch_januar_sub <- sens.slope(januar_gschnitz_sub$SWE)


#Februar


  #Abfluss
    #Poschiavino

sen_Q_leprese_februar_sub <- sens.slope(februar_Qleprese_sub$Abfluss)


    #Lech 
sen_Q_Lech_februar_sub <- sens.slope(februar_Qlech_sub$Abfluss)

    #Gschnitzbach
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_februar_sub <- sens.slope(februar_Qgsch_sub$Abfluss)


  #SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia
sen_hs_cavaglia_februar_sub <- sens.slope(februar_cav_sub$hs)


    #Alp Grû¥m
sen_hs_gruem_februar_sub <- sens.slope(februar_gruem_sub$hs)


    #Robbia
sen_hs_robbia_februar_sub <- sens.slope(februar_rob_sub$hs)


    #Lech
sen_hs_lech_februar_sub <- sens.slope(februar_lech_sub$hs)

    #Zû¥rs
sen_hs_zuers_februar_sub <- sens.slope(februar_zuers_sub$hs)

    #Zug
sen_hs_zug_februar_sub <- sens.slope(februar_zug_sub$hs)

    #Trins
sen_hs_trins_februar_sub <- sens.slope(februar_trins_sub$hs)

    #Gschnitz
sen_hs_gschnitz_februar_sub <- sens.slope(februar_gschnitz_sub$hs)


  #SWE
    #Cavaglia
sen_SWE_cavaglia_februar_sub <- sens.slope(februar_cav_sub$SWE)

    #Alp Grû¥m 
sen_SWE_gruem_februar_sub <- sens.slope(februar_gruem_sub$SWE)
    #Robbia
sen_SWE_robbia_februar_sub <- sens.slope(februar_rob_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_lech_februar_sub <- sens.slope(februar_lech_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_zuers_februar_sub <- sens.slope(februar_zuers_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_zug_februar_sub <- sens.slope(februar_zug_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_trins_februar_sub <- sens.slope(februar_trins_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_gsch_februar_sub <- sens.slope(februar_gschnitz_sub$SWE)



#MûÊrz


  #Abfluss
    #Poschiavino

sen_Q_leprese_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(maerz_Qleprese_sub$Abfluss)

    #Lech 
sen_Q_Lech_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(maerz_Qlech_sub$Abfluss)

    #Gschnitzbach
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(maerz_Qgsch_sub$Abfluss)

  #SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia
sen_hs_cavaglia_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(maerz_cav_sub$hs)


    #Alp Grû¥m
sen_hs_gruem_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(maerz_gruem_sub$hs)


    #Robbia
sen_hs_robbia_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(maerz_rob_sub$hs)


    #Lech
sen_hs_lech_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(maerz_lech_sub$hs)

    #Zû¥rs
sen_hs_zuers_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(maerz_zuers_sub$hs)

    #Zug
sen_hs_zug_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(maerz_zug_sub$hs)

    #Trins
sen_hs_trins_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(maerz_trins_sub$hs)

    #Gschnitz
sen_hs_gschnitz_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(maerz_gschnitz_sub$hs)


  #SWE
    #Cavaglia
sen_SWE_cavaglia_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(maerz_cav_sub$SWE)

    #Alp Grû¥m 
sen_SWE_gruem_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(maerz_gruem_sub$SWE)

    #Robbia
sen_SWE_robbia_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(maerz_rob_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_lech_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(maerz_lech_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_zuers_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(maerz_zuers_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_zug_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(maerz_zug_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_trins_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(maerz_trins_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_gsch_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(maerz_gschnitz_sub$SWE)


#April
 #Abfluss
    #Poschiavino

sen_Q_leprese_april_sub <- sens.slope(april_Qleprese_sub$Abfluss)


    #Lech 
sen_Q_Lech_april_sub <- sens.slope(april_Qlech_sub$Abfluss)


    #Gschnitzbach
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_april_sub <- sens.slope(april_Qgsch_sub$Abfluss)


  #SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia
sen_hs_cavaglia_april_sub <- sens.slope(april_cav_sub$hs)


    #Alp Grû¥m
sen_hs_gruem_april_sub <- sens.slope(april_gruem_sub$hs)


    #Robbia
sen_hs_robbia_april_sub <- sens.slope(april_rob_sub$hs)


    #Lech
sen_hs_lech_april_sub <- sens.slope(april_lech_sub$hs)

    #Zû¥rs
sen_hs_zuers_april_sub <- sens.slope(april_zuers_sub$hs)

    #Zug
sen_hs_zug_april_sub <- sens.slope(april_zug_sub$hs)

    #Trins
sen_hs_trins_april_sub <- sens.slope(april_trins_sub$hs)

    #Gschnitz
sen_hs_gschnitz_april_sub <- sens.slope(april_gschnitz_sub$hs)


  #SWE
    #Cavaglia
sen_SWE_cavaglia_april_sub <- sens.slope(april_cav_sub$SWE)

    #Alp Grû¥m 
sen_SWE_gruem_april_sub <- sens.slope(april_gruem_sub$SWE)

    #Robbia
sen_SWE_robbia_april_sub <- sens.slope(april_rob_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_lech_april_sub <- sens.slope(april_lech_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_zuers_april_sub <- sens.slope(april_zuers_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_zug_april_sub <- sens.slope(april_zug_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_trins_april_sub <- sens.slope(april_trins_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_gsch_april_sub <- sens.slope(april_gschnitz_sub$SWE)


#Mai

sen_Q_leprese_mai_sub <- sens.slope(mai_Qleprese_sub$Abfluss)
 

    #Lech 
sen_Q_Lech_mai_sub <- sens.slope(mai_Qlech_sub$Abfluss)

    #Gschnitzbach
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_mai_sub <- sens.slope(mai_Qgsch_sub$Abfluss)


  #SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia
sen_hs_cavaglia_mai_sub <- sens.slope(mai_cav_sub$hs)


    #Alp Grû¥m
sen_hs_gruem_mai_sub <- sens.slope(mai_gruem_sub$hs)


    #Robbia
sen_hs_robbia_mai_sub <- sens.slope(mai_rob_sub$hs)


    #Lech
sen_hs_lech_mai_sub <- sens.slope(mai_lech_sub$hs)

    #Zû¥rs
sen_hs_zuers_mai_sub <- sens.slope(mai_zuers_sub$hs)

    #Zug
sen_hs_zug_mai_sub <- sens.slope(mai_zug_sub$hs)

    #Trins
sen_hs_trins_mai_sub <- sens.slope(mai_trins_sub$hs)

    #Gschnitz
sen_hs_gschnitz_mai_sub <- sens.slope(mai_gschnitz_sub$hs)


  #SWE
    #Cavaglia
sen_SWE_cavaglia_mai_sub <- sens.slope(mai_cav_sub$SWE)

    #Alp Grû¥m 
sen_SWE_gruem_mai_sub <- sens.slope(mai_gruem_sub$SWE)

    #Robbia
sen_SWE_robbia_mai_sub <- sens.slope(mai_rob_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_lech_mai_sub <- sens.slope(mai_lech_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_zuers_mai_sub <- sens.slope(mai_zuers_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_zug_mai_sub <- sens.slope(mai_zug_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_trins_mai_sub <- sens.slope(mai_trins_sub$SWE)


sen_SWE_gsch_mai_sub <- sens.slope(mai_gschnitz_sub$SWE)


#Juni

sen_Q_leprese_juni_sub <- sens.slope(juni_Qleprese_sub$Abfluss)
 

    #Lech 
sen_Q_Lech_juni_sub <- sens.slope(juni_Qlech_sub$Abfluss)

    #Gschnitzbach
sen_Q_Gschnitzbach_juni_sub <- sens.slope(juni_Qgsch_sub$Abfluss)

  #SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia
sen_hs_cavaglia_juni_sub <- sens.slope(juni_cav_sub$hs)

    #Alp Grû¥m
sen_hs_gruem_juni_sub <- sens.slope(juni_gruem_sub$hs)

    #Robbia
sen_hs_robbia_juni_sub <- sens.slope(juni_rob_sub$hs)

    #Lech
sen_hs_lech_juni_sub <- sens.slope(juni_lech_sub$hs)
    #Zû¥rs
sen_hs_zuers_juni_sub <- sens.slope(juni_zuers_sub$hs)
    #Zug
sen_hs_zug_juni_sub <- sens.slope(juni_zug_sub$hs)
    #Trins
sen_hs_trins_juni_sub <- sens.slope(juni_trins_sub$hs)
    #Gschnitz
sen_hs_gschnitz_juni_sub <- sens.slope(juni_gschnitz_sub$hs)

  #SWE
    #Cavaglia
sen_SWE_cavaglia_juni_sub <- sens.slope(juni_cav_sub$SWE)
    #Alp Grû¥m 
sen_SWE_gruem_juni_sub <- sens.slope(juni_gruem_sub$SWE)
    #Robbia
sen_SWE_robbia_juni_sub <- sens.slope(juni_rob_sub$SWE)

sen_SWE_lech_juni_sub <- sens.slope(juni_lech_sub$SWE)

sen_SWE_zuers_juni_sub <- sens.slope(juni_zuers_sub$SWE)

sen_SWE_zug_juni_sub <- sens.slope(juni_zug_sub$SWE)
print(sen_SWE_zug_juni_sub)

sen_SWE_trins_juni_sub <- sens.slope(juni_trins_sub$SWE)

sen_SWE_gsch_juni_sub <- sens.slope(juni_gschnitz_sub$SWE)

```


```{r Nullwertetrend in hs fû¥r den gesamten Zeitraum fû¥r die SchneehûÑhe}

#Nullwertetrend, um zu detektieren ob es mehr Nullwerte gibt, was einem Trend gleich kommt, auf das hydrologische jahr dargestellt (Zunahme heiût weniger Schneetage)

library(trend)

  #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=datacavaglia, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=datagruem, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=datarobbia, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=datalech, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=datazuers, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=datazug, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=datatrins, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=datagschnitz, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))

#Nullwertetest fû¥r den Frû¥hling fû¥r en gesamten Beobachtungszeitraum Zunahme heiût weniger SchneehûÑhe (mehr Tage mit Null)

 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_s_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=s_cav_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_s_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=s_gruem_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_s_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=s_robbia_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_s_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=s_lech_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_s_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=s_zuers_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_s_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=s_zug_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_s_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=s_trins_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_s_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=s_gsch_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))


#Nullwertetest fû¥r den Winter fû¥r en gesamten Beobachtungszeitraum Zunahme heiût weniger SchneehûÑhe (mehr Tage mit Null)

 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_w_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=w_cav_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_w_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=w_gruem_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_w_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=w_robbia_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_w_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=w_lech_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zuers
```
