```{r Nullwertetrend in hs fû¥r den gesamten Zeitraum fû¥r die SchneehûÑhe}
zero_ratio_zuers_w_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=w_zuers_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_w_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=w_zug_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_w_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=w_trins_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_w_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=w_gsch_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))

    #speichern als data
mk_zr_cav <- mk.test(zero_ratio_cavaglia$hs) 
mk_zr_gruem <- mk.test(zero_ratio_gruem$hs) 
mk_zr_rob <- mk.test(zero_ratio_robbia$hs) 
mk_zr_lech <- mk.test(zero_ratio_lech$hs) 
mk_zr_zuers <- mk.test(zero_ratio_zuers$hs) 
mk_zr_zug <- mk.test(zero_ratio_zug$hs) 
mk_zr_trins <- mk.test(zero_ratio_trins$hs) 
mk_zr_gsch <- mk.test(zero_ratio_gschnitz$hs)
mk_zr_cav_s_ges <- mk.test(zero_ratio_cavaglia_s_ges$hs) 
mk_zr_gruem_s_ges <- mk.test(zero_ratio_gruem_s_ges$hs) 
mk_zr_rob_s_ges <- mk.test(zero_ratio_robbia_s_ges$hs) 
mk_zr_lech_s_ges <- mk.test(zero_ratio_lech_s_ges$hs) 
mk_zr_zuers_s_ges <- mk.test(zero_ratio_zuers_s_ges$hs) 
mk_zr_zug_s_ges <- mk.test(zero_ratio_zug_s_ges$hs) 
mk_zr_trins_s_ges <- mk.test(zero_ratio_trins_s_ges$hs) 
mk_zr_gsch_s_ges <- mk.test(zero_ratio_gschnitz_s_ges$hs)
mk_zr_cav_w_ges <- mk.test(zero_ratio_cavaglia_w_ges$hs) 
mk_zr_gruem_w_ges <- mk.test(zero_ratio_gruem_w_ges$hs) 
mk_zr_rob_w_ges <- mk.test(zero_ratio_robbia_w_ges$hs) 
mk_zr_lech_w_ges <- mk.test(zero_ratio_lech_w_ges$hs)
mk_zr_zuers_w_ges <- mk.test(zero_ratio_zuers_w_ges$hs) 
mk_zr_zug_w_ges <- mk.test(zero_ratio_zug_w_ges$hs) 
mk_zr_trins_w_ges <- mk.test(zero_ratio_trins_w_ges$hs) 
mk_zr_gsch_w_ges <- mk.test(zero_ratio_gschnitz_w_ges$hs) 

ss_zr_cav <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia$hs) 
ss_zr_gruem <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem$hs) 
ss_zr_rob <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia$hs) 
ss_zr_lech <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech$hs) 
ss_zr_zuers <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers$hs) 
ss_zr_zug <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug$hs) 
ss_zr_trins <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins$hs) 
ss_zr_gsch <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz$hs)
ss_zr_cav_s_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_s_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_gruem_s_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_s_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_rob_s_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_s_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_lech_s_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_s_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_zuers_s_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_s_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_zug_s_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_s_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_trins_s_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_s_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_gsch_s_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_s_ges$hs)
ss_zr_cav_w_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_w_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_gruem_w_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_w_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_rob_w_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_w_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_lech_w_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_w_ges$hs)
ss_zr_zuers_w_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_w_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_zug_w_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_w_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_trins_w_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_w_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_gsch_w_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_w_ges$hs) 

```

```{r Nullwertetrend fû¥r die subsetdata}
#Nullwertetrend, um zu detektieren ob es mehr NUllwerte gibt, was einem Trend gleich kommt, auf das hydrologische jahr dargestellt (Zunahme heiût weniger Schneetage) im subset Zeitraum

  #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cav_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=cavaglia_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=gruem_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=robbia_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=lech_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=zuers_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=zug_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=trins_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gsch_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=gsch_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))

#Nullwertetest fû¥r den Frû¥hling fû¥r des subset Zeitraum Zunahme heiût weniger SchneehûÑhe (mehr Tage mit Null)

 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cav_s_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=s_cav_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_s_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=s_gruem_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_s_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=s_robbia_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_s_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=s_lech_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_s_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=s_zuers_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_s_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=s_zug_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_s_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=s_trins_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gsch_s_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=s_gsch_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))


#Nullwertetest fû¥r den Winter fû¥r den subset zeitraum Zunahme heiût weniger SchneehûÑhe (mehr Tage mit Null)

 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cav_w_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=w_cav_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_w_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=w_gruem_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_w_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=w_robbia_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_w_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=w_lech_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_w_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=w_zuers_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_w_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=w_zug_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_w_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=w_trins_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gsch_w_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=w_gsch_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))

    #speichern als data
mk_zr_cav_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_cav_sub$hs) 
mk_zr_gruem_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_gruem_sub$hs)
mk_zr_rob_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_robbia_sub$hs) 
mk_zr_lech_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_lech_sub$hs) 
mk_zr_zuers_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_zuers_sub$hs) 
mk_zr_zug_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_zug_sub$hs)
mk_zr_trins_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_trins_sub$hs) 
mk_zr_gsch_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_gsch_sub$hs) 
mk_zr_cav_s_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_cav_s_sub$hs) 
mk_zr_gruem_s_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_gruem_s_sub$hs) 
mk_zr_rob_s_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_robbia_s_sub$hs) 
mk_zr_lech_s_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_lech_s_sub$hs) 
mk_zr_zuers_s_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_zuers_s_sub$hs)
mk_zr_zug_s_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_zug_s_sub$hs)
mk_zr_trins_s_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_trins_s_sub$hs)
mk_zr_gsch_s_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_gsch_s_sub$hs) 
mk_zr_cav_w_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_cav_w_sub$hs) 
mk_zr_gruem_w_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_gruem_w_sub$hs)
mk_zr_rob_w_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_robbia_w_sub$hs) 
mk_zr_lech_w_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_lech_w_sub$hs) 
mk_zr_zuers_w_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_zuers_w_sub$hs) 
mk_zr_zug_w_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_zug_w_sub$hs) 
mk_zr_trins_w_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_trins_w_sub$hs) 
mk_zr_gsch_w_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_gsch_w_sub$hs)

ss_zr_cav_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cav_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_gruem_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_rob_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_lech_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_zuers_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_zug_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_trins_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_gsch_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gsch_sub$hs)
ss_zr_cav_s_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cav_s_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_gruem_s_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_s_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_rob_s_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_s_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_lech_s_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_s_sub$hs)
ss_zr_zuers_s_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_s_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_zug_s_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_s_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_trins_s_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_s_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_gsch_s_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gsch_s_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_cav_w_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cav_w_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_gruem_w_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_w_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_rob_w_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_w_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_lech_w_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_w_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_zuers_w_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_w_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_zug_w_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_w_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_trins_w_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_w_sub$hs)
ss_zr_gsch_w_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gsch_w_sub$hs)
```

```{r Nullwertetrend in hs  fû¥r den gesamten Zeitraum fû¥r die einzelnen Monate in der Schneeperiode}
#November
 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_november_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=november_cav_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_november_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=november_gruem_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_november_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=november_rob_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_november_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=november_lech_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_november_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=november_zuers_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_november_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=november_zug_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_november_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=november_trins_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_november_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=november_gschnitz_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))

ss_zr_cav_november_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_november_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_gruem_november_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_november_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_rob_november_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_november_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_lech_november_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_november_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_zuers_november_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_november_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_zug_november_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_november_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_trins_november_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_november_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_gsch_november_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_november_ges$hs)

#Dezember

 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_dezember_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=dezember_cav_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_dezember_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=dezember_gruem_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_dezember_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=dezember_rob_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_dezember_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=dezember_lech_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_dezember_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=dezember_zuers_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_dezember_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=dezember_zug_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_dezember_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=dezember_trins_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_dezember_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=dezember_gschnitz_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))

ss_zr_cav_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_dezember_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_gruem_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_dezember_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_rob_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_dezember_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_lech_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_dezember_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_zuers_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_dezember_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_zug_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_dezember_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_trins_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_dezember_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_gsch_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_dezember_ges$hs)

#Januar

 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_januar_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=januar_cav_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_januar_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=januar_gruem_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_januar_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=januar_rob_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_januar_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=januar_lech_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_januar_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=januar_zuers_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_januar_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=januar_zug_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_januar_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=januar_trins_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_januar_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=januar_gschnitz_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))

ss_zr_cav_januar_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_januar_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_gruem_januar_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_januar_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_rob_januar_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_januar_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_lech_januar_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_januar_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_zuers_januar_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_januar_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_zug_januar_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_januar_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_trins_januar_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_januar_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_gsch_januar_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_januar_ges$hs)

#Februar

 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_februar_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=februar_cav_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_februar_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=februar_gruem_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_februar_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=februar_rob_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_februar_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=februar_lech_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_februar_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=februar_zuers_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_februar_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=februar_zug_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_februar_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=februar_trins_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_februar_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=februar_gschnitz_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))

ss_zr_cav_februar_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_februar_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_gruem_februar_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_februar_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_rob_februar_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_februar_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_lech_februar_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_februar_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_zuers_februar_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_februar_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_zug_februar_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_februar_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_trins_februar_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_februar_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_gsch_februar_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_februar_ges$hs)

#MûÊrz 

 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_maerz_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=maerz_cav_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_maerz_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=maerz_gruem_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_maerz_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=maerz_rob_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_maerz_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=maerz_lech_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_maerz_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=maerz_zuers_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_maerz_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=maerz_zug_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_maerz_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=maerz_trins_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_maerz_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=maerz_gschnitz_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))

ss_zr_cav_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_maerz_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_gruem_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_maerz_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_rob_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_maerz_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_lech_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_maerz_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_zuers_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_maerz_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_zug_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_maerz_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_trins_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_maerz_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_gsch_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_maerz_ges$hs)

#April
 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_april_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=april_cav_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_april_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=april_gruem_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_april_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=april_rob_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_april_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=april_lech_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_april_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=april_zuers_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_april_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=april_zug_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_april_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=april_trins_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_april_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=april_gschnitz_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))

ss_zr_cav_april_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_april_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_gruem_april_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_april_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_rob_april_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_april_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_lech_april_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_april_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_zuers_april_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_april_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_zug_april_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_april_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_trins_april_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_april_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_gsch_april_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_april_ges$hs)

#Mai
 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_mai_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=mai_cav_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_mai_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=mai_gruem_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_mai_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=mai_rob_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_mai_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=mai_lech_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_mai_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=mai_zuers_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_mai_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=mai_zug_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_mai_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=mai_trins_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_mai_ges <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=mai_gschnitz_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))

ss_zr_cav_mai_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_mai_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_gruem_mai_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_mai_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_rob_mai_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_mai_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_lech_mai_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_mai_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_zuers_mai_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_mai_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_zug_mai_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_mai_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_trins_mai_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_mai_ges$hs) 
ss_zr_gsch_mai_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_mai_ges$hs)




```

```{r Nullwertetrend in hs  fû¥r den subsetzeitraum fû¥r die einzelnen Monate in der Schneeperiode}
#November
 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_november_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=november_cav_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_november_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=november_gruem_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_november_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=november_rob_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_november_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=november_lech_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_november_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=november_zuers_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_november_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=november_zug_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_november_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=november_trins_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_november_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=november_gschnitz_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))

ss_zr_cav_november_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_november_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_gruem_november_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_november_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_rob_november_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_november_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_lech_november_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_november_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_zuers_november_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_november_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_zug_november_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_november_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_trins_november_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_november_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_gsch_november_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_november_sub$hs)

#Dezember

 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_dezember_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=dezember_cav_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_dezember_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=dezember_gruem_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_dezember_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=dezember_rob_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_dezember_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=dezember_lech_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_dezember_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=dezember_zuers_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_dezember_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=dezember_zug_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_dezember_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=dezember_trins_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_dezember_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=dezember_gschnitz_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))

ss_zr_cav_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_dezember_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_gruem_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_dezember_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_rob_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_dezember_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_lech_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_dezember_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_zuers_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_dezember_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_zug_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_dezember_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_trins_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_dezember_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_gsch_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_dezember_sub$hs)

#Januar

 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_januar_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=januar_cav_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_januar_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=januar_gruem_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_januar_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=januar_rob_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_januar_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=januar_lech_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_januar_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=januar_zuers_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_januar_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=januar_zug_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_januar_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=januar_trins_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_januar_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=januar_gschnitz_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))

ss_zr_cav_januar_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_januar_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_gruem_januar_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_januar_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_rob_januar_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_januar_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_lech_januar_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_januar_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_zuers_januar_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_januar_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_zug_januar_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_januar_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_trins_januar_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_januar_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_gsch_januar_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_januar_sub$hs)

#Februar

 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_februar_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=februar_cav_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_februar_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=februar_gruem_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_februar_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=februar_rob_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_februar_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=februar_lech_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_februar_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=februar_zuers_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_februar_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=februar_zug_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_februar_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=februar_trins_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_februar_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=februar_gschnitz_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))

ss_zr_cav_februar_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_februar_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_gruem_februar_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_februar_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_rob_februar_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_februar_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_lech_februar_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_februar_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_zuers_februar_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_februar_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_zug_februar_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_februar_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_trins_februar_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_februar_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_gsch_februar_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_februar_sub$hs)
#MûÊrz 

 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_maerz_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=maerz_cav_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_maerz_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=maerz_gruem_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_maerz_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=maerz_rob_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_maerz_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=maerz_lech_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_maerz_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=maerz_zuers_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_maerz_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=maerz_zug_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_maerz_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=maerz_trins_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_maerz_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=maerz_gschnitz_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))

ss_zr_cav_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_maerz_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_gruem_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_maerz_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_rob_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_maerz_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_lech_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_maerz_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_zuers_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_maerz_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_zug_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_maerz_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_trins_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_maerz_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_gsch_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_maerz_sub$hs)

#April
 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_april_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=april_cav_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_april_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=april_gruem_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_april_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=april_rob_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_april_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=april_lech_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_april_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=april_zuers_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_april_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=april_zug_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_april_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=april_trins_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_april_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=april_gschnitz_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))

ss_zr_cav_april_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_april_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_gruem_april_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_april_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_rob_april_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_april_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_lech_april_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_april_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_zuers_april_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_april_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_zug_april_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_april_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_trins_april_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_april_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_gsch_april_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_april_sub$hs)

#Mai
 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_mai_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=mai_cav_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_mai_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ hyear, data=mai_gruem_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_mai_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=mai_rob_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_mai_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=mai_lech_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_mai_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=mai_zuers_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_mai_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=mai_zug_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_mai_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=mai_trins_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_mai_sub <- aggregate(hs ~ h_year, data=mai_gschnitz_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))

ss_zr_cav_mai_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_mai_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_gruem_mai_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_mai_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_rob_mai_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_mai_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_lech_mai_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_mai_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_zuers_mai_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_mai_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_zug_mai_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_mai_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_trins_mai_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_mai_sub$hs) 
ss_zr_gsch_mai_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_mai_sub$hs)



```



```{r IntensitûÊt und Nullwertetrend der Schneedecke fû¥r den gesamten Zeitraum, bzw IntensitûÊt des SWE}
#IntensitûÊt der Schneedecke (nimmt das Volumen der Schneedecke ab, unabhûÊnig von der SchneehûÑhe)
library(trend)
  #Poschiavino
    #Cavaglia
cavaglia_in_SWE <- datacavaglia[datacavaglia$SWE > 0,]
    #Alpe Grû¥m 
gruem_in_SWE <- datagruem[datagruem$SWE > 0,]
    #Robbia
robbia_in_SWE <-datarobbia[datarobbia$SWE > 0,]

lech_in_SWE <-datalech[datalech$SWE > 0,]

zuers_in_SWE <-datazuers[datazuers$SWE > 0,]

zug_in_SWE <-datazug[datazug$SWE > 0,]

trins_in_SWE <-datatrins[datatrins$SWE > 0,]

gsch_in_SWE <-datagschnitz[datagschnitz$SWE > 0,]


#IntesitûÊt der Schneedecke im Frû¥hjahr im gesamten Beobachtungszeitraum

  #Poschiavino
    #Cavaglia
cavaglia_in_SWE_s_ges <- s_cav_ges[s_cav_ges$SWE > 0,]
    #Alpe Grû¥m 
gruem_in_SWE_s_ges <- s_gruem_ges[s_gruem_ges$SWE > 0,]
    #Robbia
robbia_in_SWE_s_ges <-s_robbia_ges[s_robbia_ges$SWE > 0,]

lech_in_SWE_s_ges <-s_lech_ges[s_lech_ges$SWE > 0,]

zuers_in_SWE_s_ges <-s_zuers_ges[s_zuers_ges$SWE > 0,]

zug_in_SWE_s_ges <-s_zug_ges[s_zug_ges$SWE > 0,]

trins_in_SWE_s_ges <-s_trins_ges[s_trins_ges$SWE > 0,]

gsch_in_SWE_s_ges <-s_gsch_ges[s_gsch_ges$SWE > 0,]

#IntesitûÊt der Schneedecke im Winter im gesamten Beobachtungszeitraum

  #Poschiavino
    #Cavaglia
cavaglia_in_SWE_w_ges <- w_cav_ges[w_cav_ges$SWE > 0,]
    #Alpe Grû¥m 
gruem_in_SWE_w_ges <- w_gruem_ges[w_gruem_ges$SWE > 0,]
    #Robbia
robbia_in_SWE_w_ges <-w_robbia_ges[w_robbia_ges$SWE > 0,]

lech_in_SWE_w_ges <-w_lech_ges[w_lech_ges$SWE > 0,]

zuers_in_SWE_w_ges <-w_zuers_ges[w_zuers_ges$SWE > 0,]

zug_in_SWE_w_ges <-w_zug_ges[w_zug_ges$SWE > 0,]

trins_in_SWE_w_ges <-w_trins_ges[w_trins_ges$SWE > 0,]

gsch_in_SWE_w_ges <-w_gsch_ges[w_gsch_ges$SWE > 0,]

cavaglia_in_SWE_s_ges$SWE <- as.numeric(cavaglia_in_SWE_s_ges$SWE)

    #Werte als data
ss_cav_in_SWE <- sens.slope(cavaglia_in_SWE$SWE) 
ss_gruem_in_SWE <- sens.slope(gruem_in_SWE$SWE) 
ss_rob_in_SWE <- sens.slope(robbia_in_SWE$SWE)
ss_lech_in_SWE <- sens.slope(lech_in_SWE$SWE)
ss_zuers_in_SWE <- sens.slope(zuers_in_SWE$SWE)
ss_zug_in_SWE <- sens.slope(zug_in_SWE$SWE)
ss_trins_in_SWE <- sens.slope(trins_in_SWE$SWE)
ss_gsch_in_SWE <- sens.slope(gsch_in_SWE$SWE)
ss_cav_in_SWE_s_ges <- sens.slope(cavaglia_in_SWE_s_ges$SWE) 
ss_gruem_in_SWE_s_ges <- sens.slope(gruem_in_SWE_s_ges$SWE) 
ss_rob_in_SWE_s_ges <- sens.slope(robbia_in_SWE_s_ges$SWE) 
ss_lech_in_SWE_s_ges <- sens.slope(lech_in_SWE_s_ges$SWE)
ss_zuers_in_SWE_s_ges <- sens.slope(zuers_in_SWE_s_ges$SWE)
ss_zug_in_SWE_s_ges <- sens.slope(zug_in_SWE_s_ges$SWE)
ss_trins_in_SWE_s_ges <- sens.slope(trins_in_SWE_s_ges$SWE)
ss_gsch_in_SWE_s_ges <- sens.slope(gsch_in_SWE_s_ges$SWE)
ss_cav_in_SWE_w_ges <- sens.slope(cavaglia_in_SWE_w_ges$SWE) 
ss_gruem_in_SWE_w_ges <- sens.slope(gruem_in_SWE_w_ges$SWE) 
ss_rob_in_SWE_w_ges <- sens.slope(robbia_in_SWE_w_ges$SWE) 
ss_lech_in_SWE_w_ges <- sens.slope(lech_in_SWE_w_ges$SWE)
ss_zuers_in_SWE_w_ges <- sens.slope(zuers_in_SWE_w_ges$SWE)
ss_zug_in_SWE_w_ges <- sens.slope(zug_in_SWE_w_ges$SWE)
ss_trins_in_SWE_w_ges <- sens.slope(trins_in_SWE_w_ges$SWE)
ss_gsch_in_SWE_w_ges <- sens.slope(gsch_in_SWE_w_ges$SWE)

#Nullwertetest des SWE

#Nullwertetrend, um zu detektieren ob es mehr NUllwerte gibt, was einem Trend gleich kommt, auf das hydrologische jahr dargestellt (Zunahme heiût weniger Schneetage)

  #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=datacavaglia, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_SWE <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=datagruem, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_SWE <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=datarobbia, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_SWE <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=datalech, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_SWE <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=datazuers, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_SWE <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=datazug, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_SWE <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=datatrins, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=datagschnitz, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))

#Nullwertetest fû¥r den Frû¥hling fû¥r en gesamten Beobachtungszeitraum Zunahme heiût weniger Tage mit SWE (mehr Tage mit Null)

 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_s_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=s_cav_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_s_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=s_gruem_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_s_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=s_robbia_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_SWE_s_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=s_lech_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_s_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=s_zuers_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_SWE_s_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=s_zug_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_SWE_s_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=s_trins_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
mk.test(zero_ratio_trins_SWE_s_ges$SWE) # signifikanter Trend (zunahme)
    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_s_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=s_gsch_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))


#Nullwertetest fû¥r den Winter fû¥r en gesamten Beobachtungszeitraum Zunahme heiût weniger Tage mit SWE (mehr Tage mit Null)

 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_w_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=w_cav_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_w_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=w_gruem_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_w_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=w_robbia_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_SWE_w_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=w_lech_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
mk.test(zero_ratio_lech_SWE_w_ges$SWE) #keine signifikanz
    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_w_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=w_zuers_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_SWE_w_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=w_zug_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_SWE_w_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=w_trins_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_w_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=w_gsch_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))

    #speichern als data
mk_zr_cav_SWE <- mk.test(zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE$SWE) 
mk_zr_gruem_SWE <- mk.test(zero_ratio_gruem_SWE$SWE) 
mk_zr_rob_SWE <- mk.test(zero_ratio_robbia_SWE$SWE) 
mk_zr_lech_SWE <- mk.test(zero_ratio_lech_SWE$SWE) 
mk_zr_zuers_SWE <- mk.test(zero_ratio_zuers_SWE$SWE) 
mk_zr_zug_SWE <- mk.test(zero_ratio_zug_SWE$SWE) 
mk_zr_trins_SWE <- mk.test(zero_ratio_trins_SWE$SWE) 
mk_zr_gsch_SWE <- mk.test(zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE$SWE)
mk_zr_cav_SWE_s_ges <- mk.test(zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_s_ges$SWE) 
mk_zr_gruem_SWE_s_ges <- mk.test(zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_s_ges$SWE) 
mk_zr_rob_SWE_s_ges <- mk.test(zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_s_ges$SWE) 
mk_zr_lech_SWE_s_ges <- mk.test(zero_ratio_lech_SWE_s_ges$SWE)
mk_zr_zuers_SWE_s_ges <- mk.test(zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_s_ges$SWE) 
mk_zr_zug_SWE_s_ges <- mk.test(zero_ratio_zug_SWE_s_ges$SWE) 
mk_zr_trins_SWE_s_ges <- mk.test(zero_ratio_trins_SWE_s_ges$SWE) 
mk_zr_gsch_SWE_s_ges <- mk.test(zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_s_ges$SWE) 
mk_zr_cav_SWE_w_ges <- mk.test(zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_w_ges$SWE) 
mk_zr_gruem_SWE_w_ges <- mk.test(zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_w_ges$SWE) 
mk_zr_rob_SWE_w_ges <- mk.test(zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_w_ges$SWE) 
mk_zr_lech_SWE_w_ges <- mk.test(zero_ratio_lech_SWE_w_ges$SWE) 
mk_zr_zuers_SWE_w_ges <- mk.test(zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_w_ges$SWE) 
mk_zr_zug_SWE_w_ges <- mk.test(zero_ratio_zug_SWE_w_ges$SWE) 
mk_zr_trins_SWE_w_ges <- mk.test(zero_ratio_trins_SWE_w_ges$SWE)
mk_zr_gsch_SWE_w_ges <- mk.test(zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_w_ges$SWE)

ss_zr_cav_SWE <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE$SWE) 
ss_zr_gruem_SWE <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_SWE$SWE) 
ss_zr_rob_SWE <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_SWE$SWE) 
ss_zr_lech_SWE <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_SWE$SWE) 
ss_zr_zuers_SWE <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_SWE$SWE) 
ss_zr_zug_SWE <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_SWE$SWE) 
ss_zr_trins_SWE <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_SWE$SWE) 
ss_zr_gsch_SWE <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE$SWE)
ss_zr_cav_SWE_s_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_s_ges$SWE) 
ss_zr_gruem_SWE_s_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_s_ges$SWE) 
ss_zr_rob_SWE_s_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_s_ges$SWE) 
ss_zr_lech_SWE_s_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_SWE_s_ges$SWE)
ss_zr_zuers_SWE_s_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_s_ges$SWE) 
ss_zr_zug_SWE_s_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_SWE_s_ges$SWE) 
ss_zr_trins_SWE_s_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_SWE_s_ges$SWE) 
ss_zr_gsch_SWE_s_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_s_ges$SWE) 
ss_zr_cav_SWE_w_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_w_ges$SWE) 
ss_zr_gruem_SWE_w_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_w_ges$SWE) 
ss_zr_rob_SWE_w_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_w_ges$SWE) 
ss_zr_lech_SWE_w_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_SWE_w_ges$SWE) 
ss_zr_zuers_SWE_w_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_w_ges$SWE) 
ss_zr_zug_SWE_w_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_SWE_w_ges$SWE) 
ss_zr_trins_SWE_w_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_SWE_w_ges$SWE)
ss_zr_gsch_SWE_w_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_w_ges$SWE)

```

```{r IntensitûÊt und Nullwertetrend der Schneedecke fû¥r die subsetdata}
#IntensitûÊt der Schneedecke (nimmt das Volumen der Schneedecke ab, unabhûÊnig von der SchneehûÑhe) im subset Zeitraum
library(trend)
  #Poschiavino
    #Cavaglia
cavaglia_in_SWE_sub <- cavaglia_sub[cavaglia_sub$SWE > 0,]
    #Alpe Grû¥m 
gruem_in_SWE_sub <- gruem_sub[gruem_sub$SWE > 0,]
    #Robbia
robbia_in_SWE_sub <-robbia_sub[robbia_sub$SWE > 0,]

lech_in_SWE_sub <-lech_sub[lech_sub$SWE > 0,]

zuers_in_SWE_sub <-zuers_sub[zuers_sub$SWE > 0,]

zug_in_SWE_sub <-zug_sub[zug_sub$SWE > 0,]


trins_in_SWE_sub <-trins_sub[trins_sub$SWE > 0,]

gsch_in_SWE_sub <-gsch_sub[gsch_sub$SWE > 0,]


#IntesitûÊt der Schneedecke im Frû¥hjahr im subset zeitraum

  #Poschiavino
    #Cavaglia
cav_in_SWE_s_sub <- s_cav_sub[s_cav_sub$SWE > 0,]
    #Alpe Grû¥m 
gruem_in_SWE_s_sub <- s_gruem_sub[s_gruem_sub$SWE > 0,]
    #Robbia
robbia_in_SWE_s_sub <-s_robbia_sub[s_robbia_sub$SWE > 0,]

lech_in_SWE_s_sub <-s_lech_sub[s_lech_sub$SWE > 0,]

zuers_in_SWE_s_sub <-s_zuers_sub[s_zuers_sub$SWE > 0,]

zug_in_SWE_s_sub <-s_zug_sub[s_zug_sub$SWE > 0,]

trins_in_SWE_s_sub <-s_trins_sub[s_trins_sub$SWE > 0,]

gsch_in_SWE_s_sub <-s_gsch_sub[s_gsch_sub$SWE > 0,]

#IntesitûÊt der Schneedecke im Winter im subset zeitraum

  #Poschiavino
    #Cavaglia
cav_in_SWE_w_sub <- w_cav_sub[w_cav_sub$SWE > 0,]
    #Alpe Grû¥m 
gruem_in_SWE_w_sub <- w_gruem_sub[w_gruem_sub$SWE > 0,]
    #Robbia
robbia_in_SWE_w_sub <-w_robbia_sub[w_robbia_sub$SWE > 0,]

lech_in_SWE_w_sub <-w_lech_sub[w_lech_sub$SWE > 0,]

zuers_in_SWE_w_sub <-w_zuers_sub[w_zuers_sub$SWE > 0,]

zug_in_SWE_w_sub <-w_zug_sub[w_zug_sub$SWE > 0,]

trins_in_SWE_w_sub <-w_trins_sub[w_trins_sub$SWE > 0,]

gsch_in_SWE_w_sub <-w_gsch_sub[w_gsch_sub$SWE > 0,]



    #Werte als data
ss_cav_in_SWE_sub <- sens.slope(cavaglia_in_SWE_sub$SWE) 
ss_gruem_in_SWE_sub <- sens.slope(gruem_in_SWE_sub$SWE) 
ss_rob_in_SWE_sub <- sens.slope(robbia_in_SWE_sub$SWE)
ss_lech_in_SWE_sub <- sens.slope(lech_in_SWE_sub$SWE)
ss_zuers_in_SWE_sub <- sens.slope(zuers_in_SWE_sub$SWE)
ss_zug_in_SWE_sub <- sens.slope(zug_in_SWE_sub$SWE)
ss_trins_in_SWE_sub <- sens.slope(trins_in_SWE_sub$SWE)
ss_gsch_in_SWE_sub <- sens.slope(gsch_in_SWE_sub$SWE)
ss_cav_in_SWE_s_sub <- sens.slope(cav_in_SWE_s_sub$SWE) 
ss_gruem_in_SWE_s_sub <- sens.slope(gruem_in_SWE_s_sub$SWE) 
ss_rob_in_SWE_s_sub <- sens.slope(robbia_in_SWE_s_sub$SWE) 
ss_lech_in_SWE_s_sub <- sens.slope(lech_in_SWE_s_sub$SWE)
ss_zuers_in_SWE_s_sub <- sens.slope(zuers_in_SWE_s_sub$SWE)
ss_zug_in_SWE_s_sub <- sens.slope(zug_in_SWE_s_sub$SWE)
ss_trins_in_SWE_s_sub <- sens.slope(trins_in_SWE_s_sub$SWE)
ss_gsch_in_SWE_s_sub <- sens.slope(gsch_in_SWE_s_sub$SWE)
ss_cav_in_SWE_w_sub <- sens.slope(cav_in_SWE_w_sub$SWE) 
ss_gruem_in_SWE_w_sub <- sens.slope(gruem_in_SWE_w_sub$SWE) 
ss_rob_in_SWE_w_sub <- sens.slope(robbia_in_SWE_w_sub$SWE) 
ss_lech_in_SWE_w_sub <- sens.slope(lech_in_SWE_w_sub$SWE)
ss_zuers_in_SWE_w_sub <- sens.slope(zuers_in_SWE_w_sub$SWE)
ss_zug_in_SWE_w_sub <- sens.slope(zug_in_SWE_w_sub$SWE)
ss_trins_in_SWE_w_sub <- sens.slope(trins_in_SWE_w_sub$SWE)
ss_gsch_in_SWE_w_sub <- sens.slope(gsch_in_SWE_w_sub$SWE)

#Nullwertetest des SWE fû¥r den subsetzeitraum

#Nullwertetrend, um zu detektieren ob es mehr NUllwerte gibt, was einem Trend gleich kommt, auf das hydrologische jahr dargestellt (Zunahme heiût weniger Schneetage)

  #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=cavaglia_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=gruem_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=robbia_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_SWE_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=lech_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=zuers_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_SWE_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=zug_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_SWE_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=trins_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=gsch_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))

#Nullwertetest fû¥r den Frû¥hling fû¥r en gesamten Beobachtungszeitraum Zunahme heiût weniger Tage mit SWE (mehr Tage mit Null)

 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_s_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=s_cav_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_s_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=s_gruem_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_s_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=s_robbia_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_SWE_s_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=s_lech_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_s_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=s_zuers_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_SWE_s_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=s_zug_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_SWE_s_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=s_trins_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_s_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=s_gsch_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))


#Nullwertetest fû¥r den Winter fû¥r en gesamten Beobachtungszeitraum Zunahme heiût weniger Tage mit SWE (mehr Tage mit Null)

 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_w_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=w_cav_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_w_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=w_gruem_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_w_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=w_robbia_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_SWE_w_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=w_lech_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_w_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=w_zuers_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_SWE_w_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=w_zug_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_SWE_w_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=w_trins_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_w_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=w_gsch_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))

    #speichern als data
mk_zr_cav_SWE_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_sub$SWE) 
mk_zr_gruem_SWE_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_sub$SWE) 
mk_zr_rob_SWE_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_sub$SWE) 
mk_zr_lech_SWE_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_lech_SWE_sub$SWE) 
mk_zr_zuers_SWE_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_sub$SWE) 
mk_zr_zug_SWE_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_zug_SWE_sub$SWE) 
mk_zr_trins_SWE_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_trins_SWE_sub$SWE) 
mk_zr_gsch_SWE_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_sub$SWE)
mk_zr_cav_SWE_s_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_s_sub$SWE) 
mk_zr_gruem_SWE_s_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_s_sub$SWE) 
mk_zr_rob_SWE_s_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_s_sub$SWE) 
mk_zr_lech_SWE_s_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_lech_SWE_s_sub$SWE)
mk_zr_zuers_SWE_s_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_s_sub$SWE) 
mk_zr_zug_SWE_s_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_zug_SWE_s_sub$SWE) 
mk_zr_trins_SWE_s_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_trins_SWE_s_sub$SWE) 
mk_zr_gsch_SWE_s_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_s_sub$SWE) 
mk_zr_cav_SWE_w_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_w_sub$SWE) 
mk_zr_gruem_SWE_w_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_w_sub$SWE) 
mk_zr_rob_SWE_w_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_w_sub$SWE) 
mk_zr_lech_SWE_w_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_lech_SWE_w_sub$SWE) 
mk_zr_zuers_SWE_w_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_w_sub$SWE) 
mk_zr_zug_SWE_w_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_zug_SWE_w_sub$SWE) 
mk_zr_trins_SWE_w_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_trins_SWE_w_sub$SWE)
mk_zr_gsch_SWE_w_sub <- mk.test(zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_w_sub$SWE)


ss_zr_cav_SWE_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_sub$SWE) 
ss_zr_gruem_SWE_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_sub$SWE) 
ss_zr_rob_SWE_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_sub$SWE) 
ss_zr_lech_SWE_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_SWE_sub$SWE) 
ss_zr_zuers_SWE_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_sub$SWE) 
ss_zr_zug_SWE_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_SWE_sub$SWE) 
ss_zr_trins_SWE_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_SWE_sub$SWE) 
ss_zr_gsch_SWE_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_sub$SWE)
ss_zr_cav_SWE_s_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_s_sub$SWE) 
ss_zr_gruem_SWE_s_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_s_sub$SWE) 
ss_zr_rob_SWE_s_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_s_sub$SWE) 
ss_zr_lech_SWE_s_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_SWE_s_sub$SWE)
ss_zr_zuers_SWE_s_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_s_sub$SWE) 
ss_zr_zug_SWE_s_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_SWE_s_sub$SWE) 
ss_zr_trins_SWE_s_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_SWE_s_sub$SWE) 
ss_zr_gsch_SWE_s_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_s_sub$SWE) 
ss_zr_cav_SWE_w_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_w_sub$SWE) 
ss_zr_gruem_SWE_w_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_w_sub$SWE) 
ss_zr_rob_SWE_w_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_w_sub$SWE) 
ss_zr_lech_SWE_w_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_SWE_w_sub$SWE) 
ss_zr_zuers_SWE_w_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_w_sub$SWE) 
ss_zr_zug_SWE_w_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_SWE_w_sub$SWE) 
ss_zr_trins_SWE_w_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_SWE_w_sub$SWE)
ss_zr_gsch_SWE_w_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_w_sub$SWE)



```

```{r IntensitûÊt und Nullwertetest des SWE fû¥r die einzelnen Monate in der Schneeperiode fû¥r den gesamten Zeitraum}
#November

#IntensitûÊt

cavaglia_in_SWE_november_ges <- november_cav_ges[november_cav_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_cav_in_SWE_november_ges <- sens.slope(cavaglia_in_SWE_november_ges$SWE) 

    
gruem_in_SWE_november_ges <- november_gruem_ges[november_gruem_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_gruem_in_SWE_november_ges <- sens.slope(gruem_in_SWE_november_ges$SWE) 



robbia_in_SWE_november_ges <-november_rob_ges[november_rob_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_rob_in_SWE_november_ges <- sens.slope(robbia_in_SWE_november_ges$SWE) 


lech_in_SWE_november_ges <-november_lech_ges[november_lech_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_lech_in_SWE_november_ges <- sens.slope(lech_in_SWE_november_ges$SWE)


zuers_in_SWE_november_ges <-november_zuers_ges[november_zuers_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_zuers_in_SWE_november_ges <- sens.slope(zuers_in_SWE_november_ges$SWE)


zug_in_SWE_november_ges <-november_zug_ges[november_zug_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_zug_in_SWE_november_ges <- sens.slope(zug_in_SWE_november_ges$SWE)



trins_in_SWE_november_ges <-november_trins_ges[november_trins_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_trins_in_SWE_november_ges <- sens.slope(trins_in_SWE_november_ges$SWE)



gsch_in_SWE_november_ges <-november_gschnitz_ges[november_gschnitz_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_gsch_in_SWE_november_ges <- sens.slope(gsch_in_SWE_november_ges$SWE)





#Nullwertetest

 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_november_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=november_cav_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_cav_SWE_november_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_november_ges$SWE) 

    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_november_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=november_gruem_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_gruem_SWE_november_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_november_ges$SWE) 

    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_november_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=november_rob_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_rob_SWE_november_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_november_ges$SWE) 

  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_SWE_november_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=november_lech_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_lech_SWE_november_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_SWE_november_ges$SWE)

    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_november_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=november_zuers_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_zuers_SWE_november_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_november_ges$SWE) 

    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_SWE_november_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=november_zug_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_zug_SWE_november_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_SWE_november_ges$SWE) 

  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_SWE_november_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=november_trins_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_trins_SWE_november_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_SWE_november_ges$SWE) 

    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_november_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=november_gschnitz_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_gsch_SWE_november_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_november_ges$SWE)

#Dezember

#IntensitûÊt

cavaglia_in_SWE_dezember_ges <- dezember_cav_ges[dezember_cav_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_cav_in_SWE_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(cavaglia_in_SWE_dezember_ges$SWE) 

    
gruem_in_SWE_dezember_ges <- dezember_gruem_ges[dezember_gruem_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_gruem_in_SWE_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(gruem_in_SWE_dezember_ges$SWE) 



robbia_in_SWE_dezember_ges <-dezember_rob_ges[dezember_rob_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_rob_in_SWE_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(robbia_in_SWE_dezember_ges$SWE) 


lech_in_SWE_dezember_ges <-dezember_lech_ges[dezember_lech_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_lech_in_SWE_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(lech_in_SWE_dezember_ges$SWE)


zuers_in_SWE_dezember_ges <-dezember_zuers_ges[dezember_zuers_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_zuers_in_SWE_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(zuers_in_SWE_dezember_ges$SWE)


zug_in_SWE_dezember_ges <-dezember_zug_ges[dezember_zug_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_zug_in_SWE_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(zug_in_SWE_dezember_ges$SWE)



trins_in_SWE_dezember_ges <-dezember_trins_ges[dezember_trins_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_trins_in_SWE_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(trins_in_SWE_dezember_ges$SWE)



gsch_in_SWE_dezember_ges <-dezember_gschnitz_ges[dezember_gschnitz_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_gsch_in_SWE_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(gsch_in_SWE_dezember_ges$SWE)





#Nullwertetest

 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_dezember_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=dezember_cav_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_cav_SWE_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_dezember_ges$SWE) 

    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_dezember_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=dezember_gruem_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_gruem_SWE_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_dezember_ges$SWE) 

    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_dezember_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=dezember_rob_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_rob_SWE_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_dezember_ges$SWE) 

  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_SWE_dezember_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=dezember_lech_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_lech_SWE_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_SWE_dezember_ges$SWE)

    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_dezember_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=dezember_zuers_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_zuers_SWE_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_dezember_ges$SWE) 

    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_SWE_dezember_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=dezember_zug_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_zug_SWE_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_SWE_dezember_ges$SWE) 

  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_SWE_dezember_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=dezember_trins_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_trins_SWE_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_SWE_dezember_ges$SWE) 

    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_dezember_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=dezember_gschnitz_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_gsch_SWE_dezember_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_dezember_ges$SWE)


#Januar

#IntensitûÊt

cavaglia_in_SWE_januar_ges <- januar_cav_ges[januar_cav_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_cav_in_SWE_januar_ges <- sens.slope(cavaglia_in_SWE_januar_ges$SWE) 

    
gruem_in_SWE_januar_ges <- januar_gruem_ges[januar_gruem_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_gruem_in_SWE_januar_ges <- sens.slope(gruem_in_SWE_januar_ges$SWE) 



robbia_in_SWE_januar_ges <-januar_rob_ges[januar_rob_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_rob_in_SWE_januar_ges <- sens.slope(robbia_in_SWE_januar_ges$SWE) 


lech_in_SWE_januar_ges <-januar_lech_ges[januar_lech_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_lech_in_SWE_januar_ges <- sens.slope(lech_in_SWE_januar_ges$SWE)


zuers_in_SWE_januar_ges <-januar_zuers_ges[januar_zuers_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_zuers_in_SWE_januar_ges <- sens.slope(zuers_in_SWE_januar_ges$SWE)


zug_in_SWE_januar_ges <-januar_zug_ges[januar_zug_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_zug_in_SWE_januar_ges <- sens.slope(zug_in_SWE_januar_ges$SWE)



trins_in_SWE_januar_ges <-januar_trins_ges[januar_trins_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_trins_in_SWE_januar_ges <- sens.slope(trins_in_SWE_januar_ges$SWE)



gsch_in_SWE_januar_ges <-januar_gschnitz_ges[januar_gschnitz_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_gsch_in_SWE_januar_ges <- sens.slope(gsch_in_SWE_januar_ges$SWE)





#Nullwertetest

 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_januar_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=januar_cav_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_cav_SWE_januar_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_januar_ges$SWE) 

    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_januar_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=januar_gruem_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_gruem_SWE_januar_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_januar_ges$SWE) 

    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_januar_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=januar_rob_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_rob_SWE_januar_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_januar_ges$SWE) 

  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_SWE_januar_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=januar_lech_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_lech_SWE_januar_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_SWE_januar_ges$SWE)

    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_januar_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=januar_zuers_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_zuers_SWE_januar_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_januar_ges$SWE) 

    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_SWE_januar_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=januar_zug_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_zug_SWE_januar_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_SWE_januar_ges$SWE) 

  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_SWE_januar_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=januar_trins_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_trins_SWE_januar_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_SWE_januar_ges$SWE) 

    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_januar_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=januar_gschnitz_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_gsch_SWE_januar_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_januar_ges$SWE)

#Februar

#IntensitûÊt

cavaglia_in_SWE_februar_ges <- februar_cav_ges[februar_cav_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_cav_in_SWE_februar_ges <- sens.slope(cavaglia_in_SWE_februar_ges$SWE) 

    
gruem_in_SWE_februar_ges <- februar_gruem_ges[februar_gruem_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_gruem_in_SWE_februar_ges <- sens.slope(gruem_in_SWE_februar_ges$SWE) 



robbia_in_SWE_februar_ges <-februar_rob_ges[februar_rob_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_rob_in_SWE_februar_ges <- sens.slope(robbia_in_SWE_februar_ges$SWE) 


lech_in_SWE_februar_ges <-februar_lech_ges[februar_lech_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_lech_in_SWE_februar_ges <- sens.slope(lech_in_SWE_februar_ges$SWE)


zuers_in_SWE_februar_ges <-februar_zuers_ges[februar_zuers_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_zuers_in_SWE_februar_ges <- sens.slope(zuers_in_SWE_februar_ges$SWE)


zug_in_SWE_februar_ges <-februar_zug_ges[februar_zug_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_zug_in_SWE_februar_ges <- sens.slope(zug_in_SWE_februar_ges$SWE)



trins_in_SWE_februar_ges <-februar_trins_ges[februar_trins_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_trins_in_SWE_februar_ges <- sens.slope(trins_in_SWE_februar_ges$SWE)



gsch_in_SWE_februar_ges <-februar_gschnitz_ges[februar_gschnitz_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_gsch_in_SWE_februar_ges <- sens.slope(gsch_in_SWE_februar_ges$SWE)





#Nullwertetest

 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_februar_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=februar_cav_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_cav_SWE_februar_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_februar_ges$SWE) 

    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_februar_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=februar_gruem_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_gruem_SWE_februar_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_februar_ges$SWE) 

    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_februar_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=februar_rob_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_rob_SWE_februar_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_februar_ges$SWE) 

  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_SWE_februar_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=februar_lech_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_lech_SWE_februar_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_SWE_februar_ges$SWE)

    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_februar_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=februar_zuers_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_zuers_SWE_februar_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_februar_ges$SWE) 

    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_SWE_februar_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=februar_zug_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_zug_SWE_februar_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_SWE_februar_ges$SWE) 

  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_SWE_februar_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=februar_trins_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_trins_SWE_februar_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_SWE_februar_ges$SWE) 

    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_februar_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=februar_gschnitz_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_gsch_SWE_februar_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_februar_ges$SWE)

#MûÊrz

#IntensitûÊt

cavaglia_in_SWE_maerz_ges <- maerz_cav_ges[maerz_cav_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_cav_in_SWE_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(cavaglia_in_SWE_maerz_ges$SWE) 

    
gruem_in_SWE_maerz_ges <- maerz_gruem_ges[maerz_gruem_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_gruem_in_SWE_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(gruem_in_SWE_maerz_ges$SWE) 



robbia_in_SWE_maerz_ges <-maerz_rob_ges[maerz_rob_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_rob_in_SWE_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(robbia_in_SWE_maerz_ges$SWE) 


lech_in_SWE_maerz_ges <-maerz_lech_ges[maerz_lech_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_lech_in_SWE_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(lech_in_SWE_maerz_ges$SWE)


zuers_in_SWE_maerz_ges <-maerz_zuers_ges[maerz_zuers_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_zuers_in_SWE_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(zuers_in_SWE_maerz_ges$SWE)


zug_in_SWE_maerz_ges <-maerz_zug_ges[maerz_zug_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_zug_in_SWE_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(zug_in_SWE_maerz_ges$SWE)



trins_in_SWE_maerz_ges <-maerz_trins_ges[maerz_trins_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_trins_in_SWE_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(trins_in_SWE_maerz_ges$SWE)



gsch_in_SWE_maerz_ges <-maerz_gschnitz_ges[maerz_gschnitz_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_gsch_in_SWE_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(gsch_in_SWE_maerz_ges$SWE)





#Nullwertetest

 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_maerz_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=maerz_cav_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_cav_SWE_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_maerz_ges$SWE) 

    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_maerz_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=maerz_gruem_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_gruem_SWE_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_maerz_ges$SWE) 

    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_maerz_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=maerz_rob_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_rob_SWE_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_maerz_ges$SWE) 

  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_SWE_maerz_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=maerz_lech_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_lech_SWE_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_SWE_maerz_ges$SWE)

    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_maerz_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=maerz_zuers_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_zuers_SWE_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_maerz_ges$SWE) 

    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_SWE_maerz_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=maerz_zug_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_zug_SWE_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_SWE_maerz_ges$SWE) 

  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_SWE_maerz_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=maerz_trins_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_trins_SWE_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_SWE_maerz_ges$SWE) 

    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_maerz_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=maerz_gschnitz_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_gsch_SWE_maerz_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_maerz_ges$SWE)



#April
#IntensitûÊt

cavaglia_in_SWE_april_ges <- april_cav_ges[april_cav_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_cav_in_SWE_april_ges <- sens.slope(cavaglia_in_SWE_april_ges$SWE) 

    
gruem_in_SWE_april_ges <- april_gruem_ges[april_gruem_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_gruem_in_SWE_april_ges <- sens.slope(gruem_in_SWE_april_ges$SWE) 


robbia_in_SWE_april_ges <-april_rob_ges[april_rob_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_rob_in_SWE_april_ges <- sens.slope(robbia_in_SWE_april_ges$SWE) 


lech_in_SWE_april_ges <-april_lech_ges[april_lech_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_lech_in_SWE_april_ges <- sens.slope(lech_in_SWE_april_ges$SWE)


zuers_in_SWE_april_ges <-april_zuers_ges[april_zuers_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_zuers_in_SWE_april_ges <- sens.slope(zuers_in_SWE_april_ges$SWE)


zug_in_SWE_april_ges <-april_zug_ges[april_zug_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_zug_in_SWE_april_ges <- sens.slope(zug_in_SWE_april_ges$SWE)



trins_in_SWE_april_ges <-april_trins_ges[april_trins_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_trins_in_SWE_april_ges <- sens.slope(trins_in_SWE_april_ges$SWE)



gsch_in_SWE_april_ges <-april_gschnitz_ges[april_gschnitz_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_gsch_in_SWE_april_ges <- sens.slope(gsch_in_SWE_april_ges$SWE)



#Nullwertetest

 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_april_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=april_cav_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_cav_SWE_april_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_april_ges$SWE) 

    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_april_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=april_gruem_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_gruem_SWE_april_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_april_ges$SWE) 

    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_april_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=april_rob_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_rob_SWE_april_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_april_ges$SWE) 

  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_SWE_april_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=april_lech_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_lech_SWE_april_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_SWE_april_ges$SWE)

    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_april_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=april_zuers_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_zuers_SWE_april_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_april_ges$SWE) 

    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_SWE_april_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=april_zug_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_zug_SWE_april_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_SWE_april_ges$SWE) 

  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_SWE_april_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=april_trins_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_trins_SWE_april_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_SWE_april_ges$SWE) 

    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_april_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=april_gschnitz_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_gsch_SWE_april_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_april_ges$SWE)


#Mai

#IntensitûÊt

cavaglia_in_SWE_mai_ges <- mai_cav_ges[mai_cav_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_cav_in_SWE_mai_ges <- sens.slope(cavaglia_in_SWE_mai_ges$SWE) 

    
gruem_in_SWE_mai_ges <- mai_gruem_ges[mai_gruem_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_gruem_in_SWE_mai_ges <- sens.slope(gruem_in_SWE_mai_ges$SWE) 


robbia_in_SWE_mai_ges <-mai_rob_ges[mai_rob_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_rob_in_SWE_mai_ges <- sens.slope(robbia_in_SWE_mai_ges$SWE) 


lech_in_SWE_mai_ges <-mai_lech_ges[mai_lech_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_lech_in_SWE_mai_ges <- sens.slope(lech_in_SWE_mai_ges$SWE)


zuers_in_SWE_mai_ges <-mai_zuers_ges[mai_zuers_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_zuers_in_SWE_mai_ges <- sens.slope(zuers_in_SWE_mai_ges$SWE)


zug_in_SWE_mai_ges <-mai_zug_ges[mai_zug_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_zug_in_SWE_mai_ges <- sens.slope(zug_in_SWE_mai_ges$SWE)



trins_in_SWE_mai_ges <-mai_trins_ges[mai_trins_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_trins_in_SWE_mai_ges <- sens.slope(trins_in_SWE_mai_ges$SWE)



gsch_in_SWE_mai_ges <-mai_gschnitz_ges[mai_gschnitz_ges$SWE > 0,]
ss_gsch_in_SWE_mai_ges <- sens.slope(gsch_in_SWE_mai_ges$SWE)



#Nullwertetest

 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_mai_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=mai_cav_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_cav_SWE_mai_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_mai_ges$SWE) 

    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_mai_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=mai_gruem_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_gruem_SWE_mai_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_mai_ges$SWE) 

    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_mai_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=mai_rob_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_rob_SWE_mai_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_mai_ges$SWE) 

  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_SWE_mai_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=mai_lech_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_lech_SWE_mai_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_SWE_mai_ges$SWE)

    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_mai_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=mai_zuers_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_zuers_SWE_mai_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_mai_ges$SWE) 

    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_SWE_mai_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=mai_zug_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_zug_SWE_mai_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_SWE_mai_ges$SWE) 

  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_SWE_mai_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=mai_trins_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_trins_SWE_mai_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_SWE_mai_ges$SWE) 

    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_mai_ges <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=mai_gschnitz_ges, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_gsch_SWE_mai_ges <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_mai_ges$SWE)


#Juni

#IntensitûÊt zu wenig vorhandene Werte 


    




#Nullwertetest zu wenig Werte




```

```{r IntensitûÊt und Nullwertetest des SWE fû¥r die einzelnen Monate in der Schneeperiode fû¥r den subsetzeitraum}
#November

#IntensitûÊt

cavaglia_in_SWE_november_sub <- november_cav_sub[november_cav_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_cav_in_SWE_november_sub <- sens.slope(cavaglia_in_SWE_november_sub$SWE) 


    
gruem_in_SWE_november_sub <- november_gruem_sub[november_gruem_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_gruem_in_SWE_november_sub <- sens.slope(gruem_in_SWE_november_sub$SWE) 



robbia_in_SWE_november_sub <-november_rob_sub[november_rob_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_rob_in_SWE_november_sub <- sens.slope(robbia_in_SWE_november_sub$SWE) 


lech_in_SWE_november_sub <-november_lech_sub[november_lech_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_lech_in_SWE_november_sub <- sens.slope(lech_in_SWE_november_sub$SWE)


zuers_in_SWE_november_sub <-november_zuers_sub[november_zuers_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_zuers_in_SWE_november_sub <- sens.slope(zuers_in_SWE_november_sub$SWE)


zug_in_SWE_november_sub <-november_zug_sub[november_zug_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_zug_in_SWE_november_sub <- sens.slope(zug_in_SWE_november_sub$SWE)



trins_in_SWE_november_sub <-november_trins_sub[november_trins_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_trins_in_SWE_november_sub <- sens.slope(trins_in_SWE_november_sub$SWE)



gsch_in_SWE_november_sub <-november_gschnitz_sub[november_gschnitz_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_gsch_in_SWE_november_sub <- sens.slope(gsch_in_SWE_november_sub$SWE)





#Nullwertetest

 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_november_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=november_cav_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_cav_SWE_november_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_november_sub$SWE) 

    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_november_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=november_gruem_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_gruem_SWE_november_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_november_sub$SWE) 

    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_november_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=november_rob_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_rob_SWE_november_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_november_sub$SWE) 

  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_SWE_november_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=november_lech_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_lech_SWE_november_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_SWE_november_sub$SWE)

    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_november_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=november_zuers_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_zuers_SWE_november_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_november_sub$SWE) 

    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_SWE_november_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=november_zug_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_zug_SWE_november_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_SWE_november_sub$SWE) 

  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_SWE_november_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=november_trins_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_trins_SWE_november_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_SWE_november_sub$SWE) 

    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_november_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=november_gschnitz_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_gsch_SWE_november_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_november_sub$SWE)

#Dezember

#IntensitûÊt

cavaglia_in_SWE_dezember_sub <- dezember_cav_sub[dezember_cav_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_cav_in_SWE_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(cavaglia_in_SWE_dezember_sub$SWE) 

    
gruem_in_SWE_dezember_sub <- dezember_gruem_sub[dezember_gruem_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_gruem_in_SWE_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(gruem_in_SWE_dezember_sub$SWE) 



robbia_in_SWE_dezember_sub <-dezember_rob_sub[dezember_rob_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_rob_in_SWE_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(robbia_in_SWE_dezember_sub$SWE) 


lech_in_SWE_dezember_sub <-dezember_lech_sub[dezember_lech_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_lech_in_SWE_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(lech_in_SWE_dezember_sub$SWE)


zuers_in_SWE_dezember_sub <-dezember_zuers_sub[dezember_zuers_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_zuers_in_SWE_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(zuers_in_SWE_dezember_sub$SWE)


zug_in_SWE_dezember_sub <-dezember_zug_sub[dezember_zug_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_zug_in_SWE_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(zug_in_SWE_dezember_sub$SWE)



trins_in_SWE_dezember_sub <-dezember_trins_sub[dezember_trins_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_trins_in_SWE_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(trins_in_SWE_dezember_sub$SWE)



gsch_in_SWE_dezember_sub <-dezember_gschnitz_sub[dezember_gschnitz_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_gsch_in_SWE_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(gsch_in_SWE_dezember_sub$SWE)





#Nullwertetest

 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_dezember_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=dezember_cav_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_cav_SWE_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_dezember_sub$SWE) 

    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_dezember_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=dezember_gruem_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_gruem_SWE_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_dezember_sub$SWE) 

    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_dezember_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=dezember_rob_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_rob_SWE_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_dezember_sub$SWE) 

  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_SWE_dezember_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=dezember_lech_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_lech_SWE_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_SWE_dezember_sub$SWE)

    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_dezember_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=dezember_zuers_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_zuers_SWE_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_dezember_sub$SWE) 

    #Zug
```
