```{r IntensitûÊt und Nullwertetest des SWE fû¥r die einzelnen Monate in der Schneeperiode fû¥r den subsetzeitraum}
zero_ratio_zug_SWE_dezember_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=dezember_zug_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_zug_SWE_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_SWE_dezember_sub$SWE) 

  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_SWE_dezember_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=dezember_trins_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_trins_SWE_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_SWE_dezember_sub$SWE) 

    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_dezember_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=dezember_gschnitz_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_gsch_SWE_dezember_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_dezember_sub$SWE)

#Januar

#IntensitûÊt

cavaglia_in_SWE_januar_sub <- januar_cav_sub[januar_cav_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_cav_in_SWE_januar_sub <- sens.slope(cavaglia_in_SWE_januar_sub$SWE) 

    
gruem_in_SWE_januar_sub <- januar_gruem_sub[januar_gruem_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_gruem_in_SWE_januar_sub <- sens.slope(gruem_in_SWE_januar_sub$SWE) 



robbia_in_SWE_januar_sub <-januar_rob_sub[januar_rob_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_rob_in_SWE_januar_sub <- sens.slope(robbia_in_SWE_januar_sub$SWE) 


lech_in_SWE_januar_sub <-januar_lech_sub[januar_lech_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_lech_in_SWE_januar_sub <- sens.slope(lech_in_SWE_januar_sub$SWE)


zuers_in_SWE_januar_sub <-januar_zuers_sub[januar_zuers_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_zuers_in_SWE_januar_sub <- sens.slope(zuers_in_SWE_januar_sub$SWE)


zug_in_SWE_januar_sub <-januar_zug_sub[januar_zug_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_zug_in_SWE_januar_sub <- sens.slope(zug_in_SWE_januar_sub$SWE)



trins_in_SWE_januar_sub <-januar_trins_sub[januar_trins_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_trins_in_SWE_januar_sub <- sens.slope(trins_in_SWE_januar_sub$SWE)



gsch_in_SWE_januar_sub <-januar_gschnitz_sub[januar_gschnitz_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_gsch_in_SWE_januar_sub <- sens.slope(gsch_in_SWE_januar_sub$SWE)





#Nullwertetest

 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_januar_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=januar_cav_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_cav_SWE_januar_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_januar_sub$SWE) 

    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_januar_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=januar_gruem_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_gruem_SWE_januar_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_januar_sub$SWE) 

    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_januar_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=januar_rob_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_rob_SWE_januar_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_januar_sub$SWE) 

  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_SWE_januar_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=januar_lech_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_lech_SWE_januar_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_SWE_januar_sub$SWE)

    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_januar_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=januar_zuers_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_zuers_SWE_januar_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_januar_sub$SWE) 

    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_SWE_januar_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=januar_zug_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_zug_SWE_januar_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_SWE_januar_sub$SWE) 

  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_SWE_januar_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=januar_trins_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_trins_SWE_januar_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_SWE_januar_sub$SWE) 

    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_januar_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=januar_gschnitz_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_gsch_SWE_januar_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_januar_sub$SWE)

#Februar

#IntensitûÊt

cavaglia_in_SWE_februar_sub <- februar_cav_sub[februar_cav_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_cav_in_SWE_februar_sub <- sens.slope(cavaglia_in_SWE_februar_sub$SWE) 

    
gruem_in_SWE_februar_sub <- februar_gruem_sub[februar_gruem_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_gruem_in_SWE_februar_sub <- sens.slope(gruem_in_SWE_februar_sub$SWE) 



robbia_in_SWE_februar_sub <-februar_rob_sub[februar_rob_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_rob_in_SWE_februar_sub <- sens.slope(robbia_in_SWE_februar_sub$SWE) 


lech_in_SWE_februar_sub <-februar_lech_sub[februar_lech_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_lech_in_SWE_februar_sub <- sens.slope(lech_in_SWE_februar_sub$SWE)


zuers_in_SWE_februar_sub <-februar_zuers_sub[februar_zuers_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_zuers_in_SWE_februar_sub <- sens.slope(zuers_in_SWE_februar_sub$SWE)


zug_in_SWE_februar_sub <-februar_zug_sub[februar_zug_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_zug_in_SWE_februar_sub <- sens.slope(zug_in_SWE_februar_sub$SWE)



trins_in_SWE_februar_sub <-februar_trins_sub[februar_trins_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_trins_in_SWE_februar_sub <- sens.slope(trins_in_SWE_februar_sub$SWE)



gsch_in_SWE_februar_sub <-februar_gschnitz_sub[februar_gschnitz_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_gsch_in_SWE_februar_sub <- sens.slope(gsch_in_SWE_februar_sub$SWE)





#Nullwertetest

 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_februar_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=februar_cav_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_cav_SWE_februar_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_februar_sub$SWE) 

    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_februar_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=februar_gruem_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_gruem_SWE_februar_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_februar_sub$SWE) 

    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_februar_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=februar_rob_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_rob_SWE_februar_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_februar_sub$SWE) 

  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_SWE_februar_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=februar_lech_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_lech_SWE_februar_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_SWE_februar_sub$SWE)

    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_februar_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=februar_zuers_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_zuers_SWE_februar_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_februar_sub$SWE) 

    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_SWE_februar_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=februar_zug_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_zug_SWE_februar_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_SWE_februar_sub$SWE) 

  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_SWE_februar_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=februar_trins_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_trins_SWE_februar_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_SWE_februar_sub$SWE) 

    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_februar_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=februar_gschnitz_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_gsch_SWE_februar_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_februar_sub$SWE)
#MûÊrz

#IntensitûÊt

cavaglia_in_SWE_maerz_sub <- maerz_cav_sub[maerz_cav_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_cav_in_SWE_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(cavaglia_in_SWE_maerz_sub$SWE) 

    
gruem_in_SWE_maerz_sub <- maerz_gruem_sub[maerz_gruem_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_gruem_in_SWE_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(gruem_in_SWE_maerz_sub$SWE) 


robbia_in_SWE_maerz_sub <-maerz_rob_sub[maerz_rob_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_rob_in_SWE_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(robbia_in_SWE_maerz_sub$SWE) 


lech_in_SWE_maerz_sub <-maerz_lech_sub[maerz_lech_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_lech_in_SWE_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(lech_in_SWE_maerz_sub$SWE)


zuers_in_SWE_maerz_sub <-maerz_zuers_sub[maerz_zuers_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_zuers_in_SWE_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(zuers_in_SWE_maerz_sub$SWE)



zug_in_SWE_maerz_sub <-maerz_zug_sub[maerz_zug_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_zug_in_SWE_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(zug_in_SWE_maerz_sub$SWE)



trins_in_SWE_maerz_sub <-maerz_trins_sub[maerz_trins_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_trins_in_SWE_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(trins_in_SWE_maerz_sub$SWE)



gsch_in_SWE_maerz_sub <-maerz_gschnitz_sub[maerz_gschnitz_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_gsch_in_SWE_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(gsch_in_SWE_maerz_sub$SWE)



#Nullwertetest

 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_maerz_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=maerz_cav_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_cav_SWE_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_maerz_sub$SWE) 

    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_maerz_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=maerz_gruem_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_gruem_SWE_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_maerz_sub$SWE) 

    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_maerz_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=maerz_rob_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_rob_SWE_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_maerz_sub$SWE) 

  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_SWE_maerz_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=maerz_lech_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_lech_SWE_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_SWE_maerz_sub$SWE)

    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_maerz_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=maerz_zuers_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_zuers_SWE_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_maerz_sub$SWE) 

    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_SWE_maerz_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=maerz_zug_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_zug_SWE_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_SWE_maerz_sub$SWE) 

  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_SWE_maerz_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=maerz_trins_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_trins_SWE_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_SWE_maerz_sub$SWE) 

    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_maerz_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=maerz_gschnitz_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_gsch_SWE_maerz_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_maerz_sub$SWE)


#April
#IntensitûÊt

cavaglia_in_SWE_april_sub <- april_cav_sub[april_cav_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_cav_in_SWE_april_sub <- sens.slope(cavaglia_in_SWE_april_sub$SWE) 

    
gruem_in_SWE_april_sub <- april_gruem_sub[april_gruem_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_gruem_in_SWE_april_sub <- sens.slope(gruem_in_SWE_april_sub$SWE) 


robbia_in_SWE_april_sub <-april_rob_sub[april_rob_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_rob_in_SWE_april_sub <- sens.slope(robbia_in_SWE_april_sub$SWE) 


lech_in_SWE_april_sub <-april_lech_sub[april_lech_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_lech_in_SWE_april_sub <- sens.slope(lech_in_SWE_april_sub$SWE)


zuers_in_SWE_april_sub <-april_zuers_sub[april_zuers_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_zuers_in_SWE_april_sub <- sens.slope(zuers_in_SWE_april_sub$SWE)


zug_in_SWE_april_sub <-april_zug_sub[april_zug_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_zug_in_SWE_april_sub <- sens.slope(zug_in_SWE_april_sub$SWE)



trins_in_SWE_april_sub <-april_trins_sub[april_trins_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_trins_in_SWE_april_sub <- sens.slope(trins_in_SWE_april_sub$SWE)



gsch_in_SWE_april_sub <-april_gschnitz_sub[april_gschnitz_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_gsch_in_SWE_april_sub <- sens.slope(gsch_in_SWE_april_sub$SWE)



#Nullwertetest

 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_april_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=april_cav_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_cav_SWE_april_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_april_sub$SWE) 

    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_april_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=april_gruem_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_gruem_SWE_april_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_april_sub$SWE) 

    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_april_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=april_rob_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_rob_SWE_april_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_april_sub$SWE) 

  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_SWE_april_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=april_lech_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_lech_SWE_april_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_SWE_april_sub$SWE)

    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_april_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=april_zuers_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_zuers_SWE_april_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_april_sub$SWE) 

    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_SWE_april_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=april_zug_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_zug_SWE_april_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_SWE_april_sub$SWE) 

  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_SWE_april_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=april_trins_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_trins_SWE_april_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_SWE_april_sub$SWE) 

    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_april_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=april_gschnitz_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_gsch_SWE_april_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_april_sub$SWE)

#Mai

#IntensitûÊt

cavaglia_in_SWE_mai_sub <- mai_cav_sub[mai_cav_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_cav_in_SWE_mai_sub <- sens.slope(cavaglia_in_SWE_mai_sub$SWE) 


    
gruem_in_SWE_mai_sub <- mai_gruem_sub[mai_gruem_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_gruem_in_SWE_mai_sub <- sens.slope(gruem_in_SWE_mai_sub$SWE) 



lech_in_SWE_mai_sub <-mai_lech_sub[mai_lech_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_lech_in_SWE_mai_sub <- sens.slope(lech_in_SWE_mai_sub$SWE)


zuers_in_SWE_mai_sub <-mai_zuers_sub[mai_zuers_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_zuers_in_SWE_mai_sub <- sens.slope(zuers_in_SWE_mai_sub$SWE)


zug_in_SWE_mai_sub <-mai_zug_sub[mai_zug_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_zug_in_SWE_mai_sub <- sens.slope(zug_in_SWE_mai_sub$SWE)



trins_in_SWE_mai_sub <-mai_trins_sub[mai_trins_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_trins_in_SWE_mai_sub <- sens.slope(trins_in_SWE_mai_sub$SWE)



gsch_in_SWE_mai_sub <-mai_gschnitz_sub[mai_gschnitz_sub$SWE > 0,]
ss_gsch_in_SWE_mai_sub <- sens.slope(gsch_in_SWE_mai_sub$SWE)



#Nullwertetest

 #Poschiavino SchneehûÑhe
    #cavaglia 
zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_mai_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=mai_cav_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_cav_SWE_mai_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_cavaglia_SWE_mai_sub$SWE) 

    #Alpe Grû¥m
zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_mai_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ hyear, data=mai_gruem_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_gruem_SWE_mai_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gruem_SWE_mai_sub$SWE) 

    #Robbia
zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_mai_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=mai_rob_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_rob_SWE_mai_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_robbia_SWE_mai_sub$SWE) 

  #Lech schneehûÑhe
    #Lech
zero_ratio_lech_SWE_mai_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=mai_lech_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_lech_SWE_mai_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_lech_SWE_mai_sub$SWE)

    #Zuers
zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_mai_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=mai_zuers_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_zuers_SWE_mai_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zuers_SWE_mai_sub$SWE) 

    #Zug 
zero_ratio_zug_SWE_mai_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=mai_zug_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_zug_SWE_mai_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_zug_SWE_mai_sub$SWE) 

  #Gschnitzbach SchneehûÑhe
    #Trins
zero_ratio_trins_SWE_mai_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=mai_trins_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_trins_SWE_mai_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_trins_SWE_mai_sub$SWE) 

    #Gschnitz
zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_mai_sub <- aggregate(SWE ~ h_year, data=mai_gschnitz_sub, function(x) sum(x==0, na.rm=TRUE))
ss_zr_gsch_SWE_mai_sub <- sens.slope(zero_ratio_gschnitz_SWE_mai_sub$SWE)



```

```{r Korrelationen zwischen SWE und Abfluss}
#Korrelation zwischen SWE und Abfluss 
#Pearson --> linearer Zusammenhang, Spearman --> nicht linearer Zusammenhang
#Korrelation ohne Lag
  #Poschiavino
    #Cavaglia
library(dplyr)
cor_pear_cav_sub <- cor(cav_leprese_merg_sub$SWE,cav_leprese_merg_sub$Abfluss, method = "pearson", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_cav_sub <- cor(cav_leprese_merg_sub$SWE, cav_leprese_merg_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
    #Alp Grû¥m 
cor_pear_gruem_sub <- cor(gruem_leprese_merg_sub$SWE, gruem_leprese_merg_sub$Abfluss, method = "pearson", use = "complete.obs") %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gruem_sub <- cor(gruem_leprese_merg_sub$SWE, gruem_leprese_merg_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs") %>% round(2)
    #Robbia
cor_pear_rob_sub <- cor(robbia_leprese_merg_sub$SWE, robbia_leprese_merg_sub$Abfluss, method = "pearson", use = "complete.obs") %>% round(2)
cor_spear_rob_sub <- cor(robbia_leprese_merg_sub$SWE, robbia_leprese_merg_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)

cor_pear_lech_sub <- cor(lech_lech_merg_sub$SWE, lech_lech_merg_sub$Abfluss, method = "pearson", use = "complete.obs") %>% round(2)
cor_spear_lech_sub <- cor(lech_lech_merg_sub$SWE, lech_lech_merg_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs") %>% round(2)

cor_pear_zuers_sub <- cor(zuers_lech_merg_sub$SWE, zuers_lech_merg_sub$Abfluss, method = "pearson", use = "complete.obs") %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zuers_sub <- cor(zuers_lech_merg_sub$SWE, zuers_lech_merg_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs") %>% round(2)

cor_pear_zug_sub <- cor(zug_lech_merg_sub$SWE, zug_lech_merg_sub$Abfluss, method = "pearson", use = "complete.obs") %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zug_sub <- cor(zug_lech_merg_sub$SWE, zug_lech_merg_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs") %>% round(2)

cor_pear_trins_sub <- cor(trins_gsch_merg_sub$SWE, trins_gsch_merg_sub$Abfluss, method = "pearson", use = "complete.obs") %>% round(2)
cor_spear_trins_sub <- cor(trins_gsch_merg_sub$SWE, trins_gsch_merg_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs") %>% round(2)

cor_pear_gsch_sub <- cor(gsch_gsch_merg_sub$SWE, gsch_gsch_merg_sub$Abfluss, method = "pearson", use = "complete.obs") %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gsch_sub <- cor(gsch_gsch_merg_sub$SWE, gsch_gsch_merg_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs") %>% round(2)


#gesamter Zeitraum
cor_spear_cav_ges <- cor(cav_leprese_merg_ges$SWE, cav_leprese_merg_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)

    #Alp Grû¥m 
cor_spear_gruem_ges <- cor(gruem_leprese_merg_ges$SWE, gruem_leprese_merg_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs") %>% round(2)
    #Robbia
cor_spear_robbia_ges <- cor(robbia_leprese_merg_ges$SWE, robbia_leprese_merg_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)

cor_spear_lech_ges <- cor(lech_lech_merg_ges$SWE, lech_lech_merg_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs") %>% round(2)

cor_spear_zuers_ges <- cor(zuers_lech_merg_ges$SWE, zuers_lech_merg_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs") %>% round(2)

cor_spear_zug_ges <- cor(zug_lech_merg_ges$SWE, zug_lech_merg_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs") %>% round(2)

cor_spear_trins_ges <- cor(trins_gsch_merg_ges$SWE, trins_gsch_merg_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs") %>% round(2)

cor_spear_gsch_ges <- cor(gsch_gsch_merg_ges$SWE, gsch_gsch_merg_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs") %>% round(2)



#Korrelation fû¥r Frû¥hling und Winter fû¥r den gesamten Zeitraum

cor_spear_cavaglia_s_ges <- cor(s_cav_ges$SWE, s_cav_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gruem_s_ges <- cor(s_gruem_ges$SWE, s_gruem_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_robbia_s_ges <- cor(s_robbia_ges$SWE, s_robbia_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_lech_s_ges <- cor(s_lech_ges$SWE, s_lech_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zuers_s_ges <- cor(s_zuers_ges$SWE, s_zuers_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zug_s_ges <- cor(s_zug_ges$SWE, s_zug_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_trins_s_ges <- cor(s_trins_ges$SWE, s_trins_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gsch_s_ges <- cor(s_gsch_ges$SWE, s_gsch_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)

cor_spear_cavaglia_s_sub <- cor(s_cav_sub$SWE, s_cav_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gruem_s_sub <- cor(s_gruem_sub$SWE, s_gruem_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_robbia_s_sub <- cor(s_robbia_sub$SWE, s_robbia_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_lech_s_sub <- cor(s_lech_sub$SWE, s_lech_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zuers_s_sub <- cor(s_zuers_sub$SWE, s_zuers_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zug_s_sub <- cor(s_zug_sub$SWE, s_zug_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_trins_s_sub <- cor(s_trins_sub$SWE, s_trins_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gsch_s_sub <- cor(s_gsch_sub$SWE, s_gsch_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)

cor_spear_cavaglia_w_ges <- cor(w_cav_ges$SWE, w_cav_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gruem_w_ges <- cor(w_gruem_ges$SWE, w_gruem_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_robbia_w_ges <- cor(w_robbia_ges$SWE, w_robbia_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_lech_w_ges <- cor(w_lech_ges$SWE, w_lech_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zuers_w_ges <- cor(w_zuers_ges$SWE, w_zuers_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zug_w_ges <- cor(w_zug_ges$SWE, w_zug_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_trins_w_ges <- cor(w_trins_ges$SWE, w_trins_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gsch_w_ges <- cor(w_gsch_ges$SWE, w_gsch_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)

cor_spear_cavaglia_w_sub <- cor(w_cav_sub$SWE, w_cav_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gruem_w_sub <- cor(w_gruem_sub$SWE, w_gruem_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_robbia_w_sub <- cor(w_robbia_sub$SWE, w_robbia_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_lech_w_sub <- cor(w_lech_sub$SWE, w_lech_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zuers_w_sub <- cor(w_zuers_sub$SWE, w_zuers_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zug_w_sub <- cor(w_zug_sub$SWE, w_zug_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_trins_w_sub <- cor(w_trins_sub$SWE, w_trins_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gsch_w_sub <- cor(w_gsch_sub$SWE, w_gsch_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)



#Korelation fû¥r die einzelenen Monate im gesamten Zeitraum 


cor_spear_cavaglia_november_ges <- cor(november_cav_ges$SWE, november_cav_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gruem_november_ges <- cor(november_gruem_ges$SWE, november_gruem_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_robbia_november_ges <- cor(november_rob_ges$SWE, november_rob_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_lech_november_ges <- cor(november_lech_ges$SWE, november_lech_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zuers_november_ges <- cor(november_zuers_ges$SWE, november_zuers_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zug_november_ges <- cor(november_zug_ges$SWE, november_zug_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_trins_november_ges <- cor(november_trins_ges$SWE, november_trins_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gsch_november_ges <- cor(november_gschnitz_ges$SWE, november_gschnitz_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)

cor_spear_cavaglia_dezember_ges <- cor(dezember_cav_ges$SWE, dezember_cav_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gruem_dezember_ges <- cor(dezember_gruem_ges$SWE, dezember_gruem_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_robbia_dezember_ges <- cor(dezember_rob_ges$SWE, dezember_rob_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_lech_dezember_ges <- cor(dezember_lech_ges$SWE, dezember_lech_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zuers_dezember_ges <- cor(dezember_zuers_ges$SWE, dezember_zuers_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zug_dezember_ges <- cor(dezember_zug_ges$SWE, dezember_zug_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_trins_dezember_ges <- cor(dezember_trins_ges$SWE, dezember_trins_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gsch_dezember_ges <- cor(dezember_gschnitz_ges$SWE, dezember_gschnitz_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)

cor_spear_cavaglia_januar_ges <- cor(januar_cav_ges$SWE, januar_cav_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gruem_januar_ges <- cor(januar_gruem_ges$SWE, januar_gruem_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_robbia_januar_ges <- cor(januar_rob_ges$SWE, januar_rob_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_lech_januar_ges <- cor(januar_lech_ges$SWE, januar_lech_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zuers_januar_ges <- cor(januar_zuers_ges$SWE, januar_zuers_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zug_januar_ges <- cor(januar_zug_ges$SWE, januar_zug_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_trins_januar_ges <- cor(januar_trins_ges$SWE, januar_trins_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gsch_januar_ges <- cor(januar_gschnitz_ges$SWE, januar_gschnitz_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)

cor_spear_cavaglia_februar_ges <- cor(februar_cav_ges$SWE, februar_cav_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gruem_februar_ges <- cor(februar_gruem_ges$SWE, februar_gruem_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_robbia_februar_ges <- cor(februar_rob_ges$SWE, februar_rob_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_lech_februar_ges <- cor(februar_lech_ges$SWE, februar_lech_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zuers_februar_ges <- cor(februar_zuers_ges$SWE, februar_zuers_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zug_februar_ges <- cor(februar_zug_ges$SWE, februar_zug_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_trins_februar_ges <- cor(februar_trins_ges$SWE, februar_trins_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gsch_februar_ges <- cor(februar_gschnitz_ges$SWE, februar_gschnitz_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)

cor_spear_cavaglia_maerz_ges <- cor(maerz_cav_ges$SWE, maerz_cav_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gruem_maerz_ges <- cor(maerz_gruem_ges$SWE, maerz_gruem_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_robbia_maerz_ges <- cor(maerz_rob_ges$SWE, maerz_rob_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_lech_maerz_ges <- cor(maerz_lech_ges$SWE, maerz_lech_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zuers_maerz_ges <- cor(maerz_zuers_ges$SWE, maerz_zuers_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zug_maerz_ges <- cor(maerz_zug_ges$SWE, maerz_zug_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_trins_maerz_ges <- cor(maerz_trins_ges$SWE, maerz_trins_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gsch_maerz_ges <- cor(maerz_gschnitz_ges$SWE, maerz_gschnitz_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)

cor_spear_cavaglia_april_ges <- cor(april_cav_ges$SWE, april_cav_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gruem_april_ges <- cor(april_gruem_ges$SWE, april_gruem_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_robbia_april_ges <- cor(april_rob_ges$SWE, april_rob_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_lech_april_ges <- cor(april_lech_ges$SWE, april_lech_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zuers_april_ges <- cor(april_zuers_ges$SWE, april_zuers_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zug_april_ges <- cor(april_zug_ges$SWE, april_zug_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_trins_april_ges <- cor(april_trins_ges$SWE, april_trins_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gsch_april_ges <- cor(april_gschnitz_ges$SWE, april_gschnitz_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)

cor_spear_cavaglia_mai_ges <- cor(mai_cav_ges$SWE, mai_cav_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gruem_mai_ges <- cor(mai_gruem_ges$SWE, mai_gruem_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_robbia_mai_ges <- cor(mai_rob_ges$SWE, mai_rob_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_lech_mai_ges <- cor(mai_lech_ges$SWE, mai_lech_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zuers_mai_ges <- cor(mai_zuers_ges$SWE, mai_zuers_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zug_mai_ges <- cor(mai_zug_ges$SWE, mai_zug_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_trins_mai_ges <- cor(mai_trins_ges$SWE, mai_trins_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gsch_mai_ges <- cor(mai_gschnitz_ges$SWE, mai_gschnitz_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)

cor_spear_cavaglia_juni_ges <- cor(juni_cav_ges$SWE, juni_cav_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gruem_juni_ges <- cor(juni_gruem_ges$SWE, juni_gruem_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_robbia_juni_ges <- cor(juni_rob_ges$SWE, juni_rob_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_lech_juni_ges <- cor(juni_lech_ges$SWE, juni_lech_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zuers_juni_ges <- cor(juni_zuers_ges$SWE, juni_zuers_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zug_juni_ges <- cor(juni_zug_ges$SWE, juni_zug_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_trins_juni_ges <- cor(juni_trins_ges$SWE, juni_trins_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gsch_juni_ges <- cor(juni_gschnitz_ges$SWE, juni_gschnitz_ges$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)


#Korelation fû¥r die einzelenen Monate im subset Zeitraum 


cor_spear_cavaglia_november_sub <- cor(november_cav_sub$SWE, november_cav_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gruem_november_sub <- cor(november_gruem_sub$SWE, november_gruem_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_robbia_november_sub <- cor(november_rob_sub$SWE, november_rob_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_lech_november_sub <- cor(november_lech_sub$SWE, november_lech_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zuers_november_sub <- cor(november_zuers_sub$SWE, november_zuers_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zug_november_sub <- cor(november_zug_sub$SWE, november_zug_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_trins_november_sub <- cor(november_trins_sub$SWE, november_trins_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gsch_november_sub <- cor(november_gschnitz_sub$SWE, november_gschnitz_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)

cor_spear_cavaglia_dezember_sub <- cor(dezember_cav_sub$SWE, dezember_cav_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gruem_dezember_sub <- cor(dezember_gruem_sub$SWE, dezember_gruem_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_robbia_dezember_sub <- cor(dezember_rob_sub$SWE, dezember_rob_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_lech_dezember_sub <- cor(dezember_lech_sub$SWE, dezember_lech_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zuers_dezember_sub <- cor(dezember_zuers_sub$SWE, dezember_zuers_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zug_dezember_sub <- cor(dezember_zug_sub$SWE, dezember_zug_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_trins_dezember_sub <- cor(dezember_trins_sub$SWE, dezember_trins_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gsch_dezember_sub <- cor(dezember_gschnitz_sub$SWE, dezember_gschnitz_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)

cor_spear_cavaglia_januar_sub <- cor(januar_cav_sub$SWE, januar_cav_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gruem_januar_sub <- cor(januar_gruem_sub$SWE, januar_gruem_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_robbia_januar_sub <- cor(januar_rob_sub$SWE, januar_rob_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_lech_januar_sub <- cor(januar_lech_sub$SWE, januar_lech_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zuers_januar_sub <- cor(januar_zuers_sub$SWE, januar_zuers_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zug_januar_sub <- cor(januar_zug_sub$SWE, januar_zug_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_trins_januar_sub <- cor(januar_trins_sub$SWE, januar_trins_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gsch_januar_sub <- cor(januar_gschnitz_sub$SWE, januar_gschnitz_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)

cor_spear_cavaglia_februar_sub <- cor(februar_cav_sub$SWE, februar_cav_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gruem_februar_sub <- cor(februar_gruem_sub$SWE, februar_gruem_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_robbia_februar_sub <- cor(februar_rob_sub$SWE, februar_rob_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_lech_februar_sub <- cor(februar_lech_sub$SWE, februar_lech_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zuers_februar_sub <- cor(februar_zuers_sub$SWE, februar_zuers_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zug_februar_sub <- cor(februar_zug_sub$SWE, februar_zug_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_trins_februar_sub <- cor(februar_trins_sub$SWE, februar_trins_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gsch_februar_sub <- cor(februar_gschnitz_sub$SWE, februar_gschnitz_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)

cor_spear_cavaglia_maerz_sub <- cor(maerz_cav_sub$SWE, maerz_cav_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gruem_maerz_sub <- cor(maerz_gruem_sub$SWE, maerz_gruem_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_robbia_maerz_sub <- cor(maerz_rob_sub$SWE, maerz_rob_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_lech_maerz_sub <- cor(maerz_lech_sub$SWE, maerz_lech_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zuers_maerz_sub <- cor(maerz_zuers_sub$SWE, maerz_zuers_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zug_maerz_sub <- cor(maerz_zug_sub$SWE, maerz_zug_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_trins_maerz_sub <- cor(maerz_trins_sub$SWE, maerz_trins_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gsch_maerz_sub <- cor(maerz_gschnitz_sub$SWE, maerz_gschnitz_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)

cor_spear_cavaglia_april_sub <- cor(april_cav_sub$SWE, april_cav_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gruem_april_sub <- cor(april_gruem_sub$SWE, april_gruem_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_robbia_april_sub <- cor(april_rob_sub$SWE, april_rob_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_lech_april_sub <- cor(april_lech_sub$SWE, april_lech_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zuers_april_sub <- cor(april_zuers_sub$SWE, april_zuers_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zug_april_sub <- cor(april_zug_sub$SWE, april_zug_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_trins_april_sub <- cor(april_trins_sub$SWE, april_trins_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gsch_april_sub <- cor(april_gschnitz_sub$SWE, april_gschnitz_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)

cor_spear_cavaglia_mai_sub <- cor(mai_cav_sub$SWE, mai_cav_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gruem_mai_sub <- cor(mai_gruem_sub$SWE, mai_gruem_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_robbia_mai_sub <- cor(mai_rob_sub$SWE, mai_rob_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_lech_mai_sub <- cor(mai_lech_sub$SWE, mai_lech_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zuers_mai_sub <- cor(mai_zuers_sub$SWE, mai_zuers_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zug_mai_sub <- cor(mai_zug_sub$SWE, mai_zug_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_trins_mai_sub <- cor(mai_trins_sub$SWE, mai_trins_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gsch_mai_sub <- cor(mai_gschnitz_sub$SWE, mai_gschnitz_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)

cor_spear_cavaglia_juni_sub <- cor(juni_cav_sub$SWE, juni_cav_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gruem_juni_sub <- cor(juni_gruem_sub$SWE, juni_gruem_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_robbia_juni_sub <- cor(juni_rob_sub$SWE, juni_rob_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_lech_juni_sub <- cor(juni_lech_sub$SWE, juni_lech_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zuers_juni_sub <- cor(juni_zuers_sub$SWE, juni_zuers_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_zug_juni_sub <- cor(juni_zug_sub$SWE, juni_zug_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_trins_juni_sub <- cor(juni_trins_sub$SWE, juni_trins_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)
cor_spear_gsch_juni_sub <- cor(juni_gschnitz_sub$SWE, juni_gschnitz_sub$Abfluss, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")  %>% round(2)

```
